34117.title: Implications of Fiscal-Monetary Interaction from HANK Models
34117.zh_title: 来自异质性代理人新凯恩斯模型的财政-货币政策互动含义
34117.abstract: I describe nine implications of the interconnectedness of fiscal and monetary policy that surface in Heterogeneous Agent New Keynesian (HANK) models. Not all are unique to HANK models. (i) Long run fiscal changes force monetary adjustments. (ii) Sustainable permanent deficits are feasible. (iii) Monetary policy leaves fiscal footprints, even with passive fiscal policy. (iv) Fewer controversies around active fiscal policy. (v) Equilibria are unique under a wider class of fiscal and monetary rules. (vi) With short-term debt, raising nominal rates without a fiscal contraction raises inflation. (vii) Unfunded fiscal stimulus is more inflationary. (viii) Even fully funded fiscal stimulus is inflationary. (ix) Fiscal transfers can substitute for monetary policy in the aggregate.
34117.zh_abstract: 我描述了在异质性代理人新凯恩斯模型中出现的财政与货币政策相互关联的九点含义。并非所有含义都独属于异质性代理人新凯恩斯模型。(i) 长期财政变化迫使货币政策调整。(ii) 可持续的永久性赤字是可行的。(iii) 即使有被动财政政策，货币政策也会留下财政足迹。(iv) 围绕积极财政政策的争议较少。(v) 在更广泛的财政和货币规则类别下，均衡是唯一的。(vi) 在短期债务情况下，不伴随财政紧缩而提高名义利率会推高通胀。(vii) 无资金支持的财政刺激更具通胀性。(viii) 即使是完全资金支持的财政刺激也具有通胀性。(ix) 财政转移支付在总体上可以替代货币政策。
34117.meta: Programs：EFG, ME；JEL：E2, E3, E4, E5, E6

34116.title: Misperceptions About Air Pollution: Implications for Willingness to Pay and Environmental Inequality
34116.zh_title: 关于空气污染的误解：对支付意愿和环境不平等的影响
34116.abstract: This paper explores whether misperceptions about air pollution contribute to environmental inequality in the United States. We use a two-part survey experiment to elicit respondents' beliefs about local air quality and pollution's effects on life expectancy. We document how misperception differs across demographic groups and then how this misperception affects willingness to pay (WTP) for cleaner air. Since misperception or beliefs may be correlated with other unobservable determinants of WTP, we randomly show selected participants customized information about their actual air pollution. This allows us to trace out how experimentally induced changes in beliefs affect WTP for air quality. Our results suggest significant misperceptions about air pollution in the US. Respondents, on average, overestimate both their air pollution exposure and its impact on life expectancy. Beliefs about relative air pollution are not systematically biased but are noisy. Despite some differences in misperceptions between Black and White respondents, counterfactual exercises do not suggest that rectifying these misperceptions would meaningfully close the observed gap in WTP and/or pollution exposure.
34116.zh_abstract: 本文探讨了关于空气污染的误解是否加剧了美国的环境不平等。我们使用一个两部分调查实验来引出受访者对当地空气质量和污染对预期寿命影响的信念。我们记录了不同人口群体间误解的差异，以及这种误解如何影响对清洁空气的支付意愿。由于误解或信念可能与支付意愿的其他不可观测决定因素相关，我们随机向部分参与者展示关于其实际空气污染的定制信息。这使我们能够追踪实验诱导的信念变化如何影响对空气质量的支付意愿。我们的结果表明，美国存在对空气污染的显著误解。受访者平均高估了他们的空气污染暴露及其对预期寿命的影响。关于相对空气污染的信念没有系统性偏差，但存在噪音。尽管黑人和白人受访者之间的误解存在一些差异，但反事实练习并未表明纠正这些误解会显著缩小观察到的支付意愿和/或污染暴露差距。

34115.title: Fear and Risk Perception: Understanding Physicians' Dynamic Responses to Malpractice Lawsuits
34115.zh_title: 恐惧与风险感知：理解医生对医疗事故诉讼的动态反应
34115.authors: Hanming Fang, Ming Li, Jia Xiang
34115.abstract: This paper investigates how physicians adjust their clinical decision-making following medical malpractice lawsuits and how these responses are driven by mental rather than ﬁnancial costs, and do not align with rational expectations. We combine a comprehensive health insurance claim database from a Chinese city with the universe of malpractice lawsuits to study changes in physician behavior and patient outcomes. We ﬁnd that physicians respond to lawsuits by practicing more conservatively, rejecting high-risk patients, reducing surgery rates, and increasing the use of diagnostic tests and traditional Chinese medicine. These changes are associated with worse patient outcomes, consistent with defensive medicine. The eﬀects are not limited to the directly involved departments but spill over to other departments within the same hospital. In addition, the changes are short-lived, with physicians reverting to their pre-lawsuit treatment patterns in eight weeks. We provide evidence that such responses are likely driven by mental cost (including fear) and deviate from rational expectations. First, physicians in hospitals with more and less frequent lawsuits exhibit similar responses to a new lawsuit; moreover, they respond similarly to winning and losing cases. Second, physicians’ reactions to a patient’s death vary depending on the recency of a salient lawsuit. Lastly, physician responses are especially strong following criminal violence against physicians, which is emotionally and psychologically salient.
34115.zh_abstract: 本文研究了医生在遭遇医疗事故诉讼后如何调整其临床决策，以及这些反应如何由心理成本而非财务成本驱动，并且与理性预期不符。我们结合中国某城市的综合健康保险索赔数据库与所有医疗事故诉讼案件，研究医生行为及患者结果的变化。我们发现，医生对诉讼的反应是采取更保守的诊疗方式，拒绝高风险患者，降低手术率，并增加诊断测试和中医的使用。这些变化与更差的患者结果相关，符合防御性医疗的特征。影响不仅限于直接涉事科室，还会溢出到同一医院的其他科室。此外，这些变化是短暂的，医生在八周内恢复到诉讼前的治疗模式。我们提供的证据表明，此类反应很可能由心理成本（包括恐惧）驱动，并偏离理性预期。首先，在诉讼频率高和低的医院中，医生对新诉讼的反应相似；此外，他们对胜诉和败诉案件的反应也相似。其次，医生对患者死亡的反应取决于近期是否发生过引人注目的诉讼。最后，医生在针对医生的刑事暴力事件后反应尤为强烈，这类事件在情感和心理上更为突出。

34114.title: Concentration and Markups in International Trade
34114.zh_title: 国际贸易中的集中度与加成率
34114.authors: Vanessa I. Alviarez, Michele Fioretti, Ken Kikkawa, Monica Morlacco
34114.abstract: This paper derives a closed-form expression linking aggregate markups on imported inputs to concentration in a model of firm-to-firm trade with two-sided market power. Our theory extends standard oligopoly insights in two dimensions. First, it reveals that markups increase with exporter concentration and decrease with importer concentration, reflecting the balance of oligopoly and oligopsony forces. Second, it adapts conventional market definitions to reflect rigid trading relationships, yielding new concentration measures that capture competition in firm-to-firm trade. Analysis of Colombian transaction-level import data shows these differences are key to understanding markup dynamics in international trade.
34114.zh_abstract: 本文在具有双边市场势力的企业间贸易模型中，推导出进口投入品总加成率与集中度之间的闭式表达式。我们的理论在两个维度上扩展了标准寡头垄断见解。首先，它揭示了加成率随出口商集中度上升而增加，随进口商集中度上升而下降，反映了寡头垄断与寡头垄断力量的平衡。其次，它调整了传统的市场定义以反映刚性的贸易关系，从而产生了新的集中度衡量指标，用以捕捉企业间贸易中的竞争。对哥伦比亚交易层面进口数据的分析表明，这些差异是理解国际贸易中加成率动态的关键。

34113.title: Market Rents and CPI Shelter Inflation
34113.authors: Laurence M. Ball, Kyung Woong Koh
34113.abstract: Recent research finds that the shelter component of CPI inflation responds with a lag to movements in market rents—the rents that tenants pay when they move into a new dwelling. This paper seeks to improve our understanding of this fact. We start by identifying three sources of lags between market rents and CPI shelter: the rents of most tenants are set in long-term leases; rents are smoothed for continuing tenants who renew leases; and CPI shelter inflation is measured with rent changes over six months. We incorporate these lags in a model of shelter inflation and compare the model to monthly data since 2015, using the Zillow Observed Rent Index to measure market rents. We find that the model performs fairly well, suggesting that it may be useful for understanding and forecasting inflation.
34113.zh_abstract: 近期研究发现，CPI通胀中的住房成分对市场租金（租户搬入新住房时支付的租金）变动的反应存在滞后。本文旨在加深对这一事实的理解。我们首先识别出市场租金与CPI住房之间的三个滞后来源：大多数租户的租金由长期租赁合同设定；续租的持续租户的租金被平滑处理；以及CPI住房通胀是通过六个月内的租金变动来衡量的。我们将这些滞后纳入一个住房通胀模型，并使用Zillow观测租金指数来衡量市场租金，将该模型与2015年以来的月度数据进行比较。我们发现该模型表现相当良好，表明它可能有助于理解和预测通胀。

34112.title: Random Walk Forecasts of Stationary Processes Have Low Bias
34112.zh_title: 平稳过程的随机游走预测具有低偏差
34112.authors: Kenneth D. West, Kurt G. Lunsford
34112.abstract: We study the use of a misspecified overdifferenced model to forecast the level of a stationary scalar time series. Let x(t) be the series, and let bias be the sample average of a series of forecast errors. Then, the bias of forecasts of x(t) generated by a misspecified overdifferenced ARMA model for Δx(t) will tend to be smaller in magnitude than the bias of forecasts of x(t) generated by a correctly specified model for x(t). Formally, let P be the number of forecasts. The bias from the model for Δx(t) has a variance that is O(1/P^2), while the variance of the bias from the model for x(t) generally is O(1/P). With a driftless random walk as our baseline overdifferenced model, we confirm this theoretical result with simulations and empirical work: random walk bias is generally one-tenth to one-half that of an appropriately specified model fit to levels.
34112.zh_abstract: 我们研究了使用错误设定的过度差分模型来预测平稳标量时间序列水平值的情况。设x(t)为序列，偏差为一系列预测误差的样本均值。那么，由Δx(t)的错误设定过度差分ARMA模型生成的x(t)预测的偏差，其幅度往往小于由x(t)的正确设定模型生成的x(t)预测的偏差。形式上，设P为预测次数。来自Δx(t)模型的偏差的方差为O(1/P^2)，而来自x(t)模型的偏差的方差通常为O(1/P)。以无漂移随机游走作为我们的基准过度差分模型，我们通过模拟和实证工作证实了这一理论结果：随机游走偏差通常是对水平值拟合的适当设定模型偏差的十分之一到一半。
34112.meta: Programs：AP, EFG, IFM, ME, TWP；JEL：C22, C53, E37, E47

34111.title: Do Environmental Markets Improve Allocative Efficiency? Evidence from U.S. Air Pollution
34111.zh_title: 环境市场能提高配置效率吗？来自美国空气污染的证据
34111.abstract: The central appeal of environmental markets – efficient allocation of emission reductions – has been difficult to validate empirically. We develop a framework linking the theoretical change in allocative efficiency following a market-based policy to a quasi-experimental estimator. We apply this framework with administrative data to two major U.S. air pollution markets. We find allocative efficiency for pollution improved by 3.3 percentage points annually under California’s RECLAIM program but do not detect a change under the U.S.’ NOₓ Budget Trading Program. These results are supported by greater heterogeneity in baseline facility characteristics under RECLAIM and differences in program implementation.
34111.zh_abstract: 环境市场的核心吸引力——减排量的有效配置——一直难以通过实证验证。我们构建了一个框架，将市场导向政策后配置效率的理论变化与准实验估计量联系起来。我们利用行政数据将该框架应用于美国两个主要的空气污染市场。我们发现，在加利福尼亚州的RECLAIM计划下，污染配置效率每年提高了3.3个百分点，但在美国的NOₓ预算交易计划下未检测到变化。这些结果得到了RECLAIM计划下设施基线特征更大异质性以及计划实施差异的支持。

34110.title: Markups and Cost Pass-through Along the Supply Chain
34110.zh_title: 供应链中的加成率与成本传导
34110.authors: Santiago Alvarez-Blaser, Alberto Cavallo, Alexander MacKay, Paolo Mengano
34110.abstract: We use a novel dataset of production costs, wholesale prices, and retail prices from a large global manufacturer to study markups and pricing behavior along the supply chain. We document new facts about the distribution and dynamics of markups, and we propose a model of supply-chain pricing behavior that rationalizes key patterns in our data. We find substantial dispersion in markups across products and negative correlations between manufacturer and retail markups in the cross section and over time. Despite time-series variation in markups at each stage, total markups—reflecting the relationship between retail prices and production costs—are stable over time, even as prices rose during the 2022 inflationary episode in the United States. This evidence indicates frequent margin reallocation along the supply chain. We apply our model, which links margin shares to bargaining weights, to quantify predictors of relative bargaining power between the manufacturer and retailers. Finally, we characterize the dynamics of cost pass-through and the mediating role of manufacturer-retailer bargaining, with implications for policy debates on tariffs and trade.
34110.zh_abstract: 我们使用来自一家大型全球制造商的独特数据集，包括生产成本、批发价格和零售价格，来研究供应链中的加成率和定价行为。我们记录了关于加成率分布和动态的新事实，并提出了一个供应链定价行为模型，该模型合理化了我们数据中的关键模式。我们发现产品间加成率存在显著离散性，并且制造商加成率与零售加成率在横截面和时间序列上呈负相关。尽管每个阶段的加成率存在时间序列变化，但总加成率——反映零售价格与生产成本之间的关系——随时间保持稳定，即使在2022年美国通胀期间价格上涨时也是如此。这一证据表明供应链上频繁的利润重新分配。我们应用我们的模型（该模型将利润份额与议价权重联系起来）来量化制造商与零售商之间相对议价能力的预测因素。最后，我们描述了成本传导的动态以及制造商-零售商议价的中介作用，这对关税和贸易的政策辩论具有启示意义。
34110.meta: Programs：EFG, IFM, IO；JEL：D22, D40, E3, L11, L81

34109.title: The Social Lifecycle Impacts of Power Plant Siting in the Historical United States
34109.zh_title: 历史美国电厂选址的社会生命周期影响
34109.authors: Karen Clay, Danae Hernandez-Cortes, Akshaya Jha, Joshua A. Lewis, Noah S. Miller, Edson R. Severnini
34109.abstract: This paper examines the relative contributions of siting decisions and post-siting demo-graphic shifts to current disparities in exposure to polluting fossil-fuel plants in the United States. Our analysis leverages newly digitized data on power plant siting and operations from 1900-2020, combined with spatially resolved demographics and population data from the U.S Census from 1870-2020. We find little evidence that fossil-fuel plants were disproportionately sited in counties with higher Black population shares on average. However, event study estimates indicate that Black population share grows in the decades after the first fossil-fuel plant is built in a county, with average increases in Black population share of 4 percentage points in the 50-70 years after first siting. These long-run demographic shifts are driven by counties that first hosted a fossil-fuel plant between 1900-1949. We close by exploring how these long-run demographic shifts were shaped by the Great Migration, differential sorting in response to pollution, and other factors. Our findings highlight that the equity implications of siting long-lived infrastructure can differ dramatically depending on the time span considered.
34109.zh_abstract: 本文考察了选址决策和选址后人口结构变化对当前美国污染性化石燃料电厂暴露差异的相对贡献。我们的分析利用了1900-2020年电厂选址和运营的新数字化数据，并结合了1870-2020年美国人口普查的空间分辨人口统计数据。我们发现，几乎没有证据表明化石燃料电厂平均而言不成比例地选址在黑人人口比例较高的县。然而，事件研究估计表明，在某个县建造第一座化石燃料电厂后的几十年里，黑人人口比例有所增长，在首次选址后的50-70年内，黑人人口比例平均增加了4个百分点。这些长期人口结构变化是由在1900-1949年间首次拥有化石燃料电厂的县驱动的。最后，我们探讨了这些长期人口结构变化是如何受到大迁徙、对污染的不同分类响应以及其他因素的影响。我们的研究结果强调，选址长期基础设施的公平性影响可能因考虑的时间跨度不同而存在巨大差异。
34109.meta: Programs：DAE, EEE；JEL：D63, J18, N72, Q53, Q58

34108.title: Optimal Tariffs with Geopolitical Alignment
34108.zh_title: 地缘政治联盟下的最优关税
34108.authors: John S. Becko, Gene M. Grossman, Elhanan Helpman
34108.abstract: As geopolitical tensions intensify, great powers often turn to trade policy to influence international alignment. We examine the optimal design of tariffs in a world where large countries care not only about economic welfare but also about the political allegiance of smaller states. We consider both a unipolar setting, where a single hegemon uses preferential trade agreements to attract partners, and a bipolar world, where two great powers compete for influence. In both scenarios, we derive optimal tariffs that balance terms-of-trade considerations with strategic incentives to encourage political alignment. We find that when geopolitical concerns are active, the optimal tariff exceeds the classic Mill-Bickerdike level. In a bipolar world, optimal tariffs reflect both economic and political rivalry, and may be strategic complements or substitutes. A calibration exercise using U.N. voting patterns, an estimate of the cost of buying votes in the U.N., and military spending suggests that geopolitical motives can significantly amplify protectionist pressures and that the emergence of a second great power can contribute to a retreat from globalization.
34108.zh_abstract: 随着地缘政治紧张局势加剧，大国通常诉诸贸易政策来影响国际联盟。我们研究了在一个大国不仅关心经济福利还关心小国政治忠诚度的世界中，关税的最优设计。我们考虑了单极格局（一个霸权国使用优惠贸易协定来吸引伙伴）和两极世界（两个大国争夺影响力）两种情况。在这两种情景下，我们推导出最优关税，以平衡贸易条件考量与鼓励政治联盟的战略激励。我们发现，当地缘政治关切活跃时，最优关税超过了经典的米尔-比克迪克水平。在两极世界中，最优关税既反映了经济竞争也反映了政治竞争，并且可能是战略互补或战略替代的。使用联合国投票模式、购买联合国选票的成本估计以及军费开支进行的校准练习表明，地缘政治动机可能显著加剧保护主义压力，而第二个大国的出现可能助长全球化的退潮。

34107.title: The Legacy of High Inflation on Monetary Policy Rules
34107.zh_title: 高通胀历史对货币政策规则的影响
34107.authors: Luis I. Jacome, Nicolas E. Magud, Samuel Pienknagura, Martín Uribe
34107.abstract: This paper shows the key, yet overlooked, role played by the legacy of a high inflation history on the strength of the monetary policy response to inflationary shocks. To rationalize this, we propose a New Keynesian model that diverges from the existing workhorse model by adding path-dependence (to a forward-looking model) and potentially imperfect central bank credibility. We show that achieving low inflation (hitting the target) requires more aggressive monetary policy reactions, and is costlier from an output point of view, when individuals’ past inflationary experiences shape their inflation expectation formation. In turn, we provide empirical evidence of the need for these two theoretical additions. Countries that experienced a high level of inflation before adopting the IT regime tend to respond more aggressively to deviations of inflation expectations from the central bank’s target. We also point to the existence of a credibility puzzle, whereby the strength of a central bank’s monetary policy response to deviations from the inflation target remains broadly unchanged even as central banks gain credibility over time. Put differently, a country’s inflationary past casts a long and persistent shadow on central banks.
34107.zh_abstract: 本文展示了高通胀历史遗留问题对货币政策应对通胀冲击力度所起的关键但被忽视的作用。为了解释这一点，我们提出了一个新凯恩斯模型，该模型通过增加路径依赖性（到一个前瞻性模型中）以及潜在的不完全央行可信度，与现有的主流模型有所不同。我们表明，当个人的过去通胀经历塑造其通胀预期形成时，实现低通胀（达到目标）需要更激进的货币政策反应，并且从产出角度看成本更高。反过来，我们为这两种理论补充的必要性提供了经验证据。在采用通胀目标制之前经历过高通胀水平的国家，往往对通胀预期偏离央行目标的情况做出更激进的反应。我们还指出了存在一个可信度谜题，即央行对通胀目标偏离的货币政策反应强度，即使随着时间推移央行获得了可信度，也基本保持不变。换句话说，一个国家的通胀历史给央行投下了漫长而持久的阴影。

34106.title: Are Juries Racially Discriminatory? Evidence from the Race-Blind Charging of Grand Jury Defendants with and without Racially Distinctive Names
34106.zh_title: 陪审团是否存在种族歧视？来自种族盲审大陪审团对具有与不具有种族特征姓名的被告起诉的证据
34106.authors: Mark Hoekstra, Suhyeon Oh, Meradee Tangvatcharapong
34106.abstract: We implement five different tests of whether grand juries, which are drawn from a representative cross-section of the public, discriminate against Black defendants when deciding to prosecute felony cases. Three tests exploit that while jurors do not directly observe defendant race, jurors do observe the “Blackness” of defendants’ names. All three tests—an audit-study-style test, a traditional outcome-based test, and a test that estimates racial bias using blinded/unblinded comparisons after purging omitted variable bias—indicate juries do not discriminate based on race. Two additional tests indicate racial bias explains at most 0.3 percent of the Black-White felony conviction gap.
34106.zh_abstract: 我们实施了五项不同的检验，以考察大陪审团（由公众的代表性横截面组成）在决定是否起诉重罪案件时，是否歧视黑人被告。其中三项检验利用了这样一个事实：虽然陪审员无法直接观察到被告的种族，但他们确实能观察到被告姓名的“黑人性”。所有这三项检验——一项审计研究式检验、一项传统的结果导向检验，以及一项在消除遗漏变量偏差后使用盲审/非盲审比较来估计种族偏见的检验——均表明陪审团不存在基于种族的歧视。另外两项检验表明，种族偏见最多只能解释黑人与白人重罪定罪差距的0.3%。

34105.title: Sequential College Admission Mechanisms and Off-Platform Options
34105.zh_title: 顺序大学录取机制与平台外选项
34105.authors: Olivier De Groote, Anaïs Fabre, Margaux Luflade, Arnaud Maurel
34105.abstract: The optimal functioning of centralized allocation systems is undermined by the presence of institutions operating off-platform—a feature common to virtually all real-world implementations. These off-platform options generate justified envy, as students may reject their centralized assignment in favor of an outside offer, leaving vacant seats in programs that others would have preferred to their current match. We examine whether sequential assignment procedures can mitigate this inefficiency: they allow students to delay their enrollment decision to potentially receive a better offer later, at the cost of waiting before knowing their final admission outcome. To quantify this trade-off, we estimate a dynamic model of application and acceptance decisions using rich administrative data from the French college admission system, which include rank-ordered lists and waiting decisions. We find that waiting costs are large. Yet, by improving students’ assignment outcomes relative to a standard single-round system, the sequential mechanism decreases the share of students who leave the higher education system without a degree by 5.4% and leads to large welfare gains.
34105.zh_abstract: 集中分配系统的最佳运作受到平台外机构存在的影响——这一特征几乎普遍存在于所有现实世界的实施中。这些平台外选项会产生合理的嫉妒，因为学生可能会拒绝他们的集中分配结果而选择外部录取通知，从而在那些其他人更偏好于其当前匹配的项目中留下空缺名额。我们考察了顺序分配程序能否缓解这种低效率：它们允许学生推迟入学决定，以便稍后可能获得更好的录取通知，但代价是在知道最终录取结果之前需要等待。为了量化这一权衡，我们使用来自法国大学录取系统的丰富行政数据（包括排序列表和等待决定）估计了一个关于申请和接受决定的动态模型。我们发现等待成本很大。然而，通过改善学生相对于标准单轮系统的分配结果，顺序机制使离开高等教育系统而未获得学位的学生比例降低了5.4%，并带来了巨大的福利收益。
34105.meta: Programs：ED, IO, LS, PE；JEL：C61, I0, I23, I3

34104.title: Seemingly Virtuous Complexity in Return Prediction
34104.zh_title: 看似有益的回报预测复杂性
34104.abstract: Return prediction with Random Fourier Features (RFF)—a very large number, P , of nonlinear trans-formations of a small number, K, of predictor variables—has become popular recently. Surprisingly, this approach appears to yield a successful out-of-sample stock market index timing strategy even when trained in rolling windows as small as T = 12 months with P in the thousands. However, when P ≫ T , the RFF-based forecast becomes a weighted average of the T training sample returns, with weights determined by the similarity between the predictor vectors in the training data and the current predictor vector. In short training windows, similarity primarily reflects temporal proximity, so the forecast reduces to a recency-weighted average of the T return observations in the training data—essentially a momentum strategy. Moreover, because similarity declines with predictor volatility, the result is a volatility-timed momentum strategy. The strong performance of the RFF-based strategy thus stems not from its ability to extract predictive signals from the training data, but from the fact that a volatility-timed momentum strategy happened to perform well in historical data. This point becomes clear when applying the same method to artificial data in which returns exhibit reversals rather than momentum: the RFF approach still constructs the same volatility-timed momentum strategy, which then performs poorly.
34104.zh_abstract: 使用随机傅里叶特征（RFF）进行回报预测——即对少量（K个）预测变量进行大量（P个）非线性变换——近来变得流行。令人惊讶的是，即使在使用小至T=12个月的滚动窗口且P达到数千的情况下，这种方法似乎也能产生成功的样本外股市指数择时策略。然而，当P远大于T时，基于RFF的预测变成了T个训练样本回报的加权平均值，权重由训练数据中的预测向量与当前预测向量之间的相似性决定。在短训练窗口中，相似性主要反映时间邻近性，因此预测简化为训练数据中T个回报观测值的近期加权平均值——本质上是一种动量策略。此外，由于相似性随预测变量的波动性而下降，结果便是一种波动率择时的动量策略。因此，基于RFF的策略的强劲表现并非源于其从训练数据中提取预测信号的能力，而是因为波动率择时的动量策略在历史数据中恰好表现良好。当将相同方法应用于回报呈现反转而非动量的人工数据时，这一点变得清晰：RFF方法仍然构建了相同的波动率择时动量策略，而该策略随后表现不佳。

34102.title: Turning Points in Inflation: A Structural Breaks Approach with Micro Data
34102.zh_title: 通胀的转折点：基于微观数据的结构突变方法
34102.abstract: This paper uses high-frequency, disaggregated price data together with standard structural break techniques to provide policymakers with more timely and precise signals of inflation dynamics. Our contribution lies in leveraging granular datasets to provide early signals of inflation turning points. We measure underlying inflation trends using the slope of the log price index, a choice that helps reduce noise relative to conventional inflation rates, and then employ break-detection methods to identify significant shifts. We apply this framework to study two recent episodes: Argentina’s 2024–2025 disinflation and the inflationary impact of U.S. tariff adjustments in 2025. For Argentina, we detect a broad-based disinflationary turning point in May 2024. For the U.S., we find evidence of a turning point in February 2025, with significant sectoral accelerations despite stable aggregate measures. These case studies highlight the usefulness of applying structural break methods to the slope of price indices for improving real-time inflation monitoring and policy decision-making.
34102.zh_abstract: 本文利用高频、细分的价格数据，结合标准的结构突变技术，为政策制定者提供更及时、更精确的通胀动态信号。我们的贡献在于利用细粒度数据集来提供通胀转折点的早期信号。我们使用对数价格指数的斜率来衡量潜在通胀趋势，这一选择有助于减少相对于传统通胀率的噪音，然后采用突变检测方法来识别显著变化。我们将这一框架应用于研究两个近期事件：阿根廷2024-2025年的反通胀过程以及2025年美国关税调整的通胀影响。对于阿根廷，我们检测到2024年5月出现了一个广泛的反通胀转折点。对于美国，我们发现了2025年2月出现转折点的证据，尽管总体指标稳定，但多个行业出现了显著加速。这些案例研究突显了将结构突变方法应用于价格指数斜率对于改进实时通胀监测和政策决策的实用性。

34101.title: Why Did Air Conditioning Adoption Accelerate Faster Than Predicted? Evidence from Mexico
34101.zh_title: 为什么空调普及速度比预测的更快？来自墨西哥的证据
34101.abstract: A common theme in the vast literature on climate change is the estimation of models using historical data to make predictions many decades into the future. Although there is a large and growing number of these types of studies, researchers rarely return later to check the accuracy of their predictions. In this paper, we perform such an exercise. In Davis and Gertler (2015), we used household-level microdata from Mexico to predict future air conditioning adoption as a function of income and temperature. Revisiting these predictions with 12 years of additional data, we find that air conditioning in Mexico has accelerated, significantly exceeding our predictions. Neither errors in predicting income growth or rising temperatures, nor migration patterns, nor an overly restrictive model can explain the large prediction gap. Instead, our results point to the failure to account for falling electricity prices and technological changes in air conditioner eﬀiciency as key drivers of the prediction gap.
34101.zh_abstract: 在关于气候变化的大量文献中，一个常见主题是使用历史数据估计模型以对未来几十年做出预测。尽管这类研究数量庞大且不断增长，但研究人员很少在事后回头检验其预测的准确性。在本文中，我们进行了这样一项检验。在Davis和Gertler（2015）的研究中，我们使用墨西哥的家庭层面微观数据，根据收入和温度预测了未来的空调普及率。利用额外的12年数据重新审视这些预测，我们发现墨西哥的空调普及已经加速，显著超过了我们的预测。无论是收入增长预测的误差、气温上升、人口迁移模式，还是过于严格的模型，都无法解释这一巨大的预测差距。相反，我们的结果表明，未能考虑电价下降和空调效率的技术变化是造成预测差距的关键驱动因素。
34101.meta: Programs：DEV, EEE；JEL：D12, H23, Q40, Q41, Q47, Q54

34100.title: GenAI Misinformation, Trust, and News Consumption: Evidence from a Field Experiment
34100.zh_title: 生成式人工智能错误信息、信任与新闻消费：来自实地实验的证据
34100.authors: Filipe R. Campante, Ruben Durante, Felix Hagemeister, Ananya Sen
34100.abstract: We study how AI-generated misinformation affects demand for trustworthy news, using data from a field experiment by a major German outlet, Süddeutsche Zeitung (SZ). Readers were randomly assigned to a treatment highlighting the challenge of distinguishing real from AI-generated images. The treatment raised concern with misinformation (0.3 s.d.) and reduced trust in news (0.1 s.d.), including SZ. Importantly, it affected post-survey browsing behavior: daily visits to SZ digital content rose by 2.5% in the immediate aftermath of the treatment. Moreover, we find that subscriber retention increased by 1.1% after five months, corresponding to about a one-third drop in attrition rate. Results are consistent with a model where the relative value of trustworthy news sources increases with the prevalence of misinformation, which may thus boost engagement with those sources even while lowering trust in news content.
34100.zh_abstract: 我们利用德国主要媒体《南德意志报》（SZ）进行的一项实地实验数据，研究了人工智能生成的错误信息如何影响对可信新闻的需求。读者被随机分配到一个处理组，该处理组强调了区分真实图像与人工智能生成图像的挑战。该处理提高了对错误信息的担忧（0.3个标准差），并降低了对新闻（包括SZ）的信任（0.1个标准差）。重要的是，它影响了调查后的浏览行为：在处理后的短期内，每日访问SZ数字内容的次数增加了2.5%。此外，我们发现五个月后订阅用户留存率提高了1.1%，相当于流失率下降了约三分之一。结果与一个模型一致，在该模型中，可信新闻来源的相对价值随着错误信息的盛行而增加，因此即使降低了对新闻内容的信任，也可能提升与这些来源的互动。

34153.title: The Breakdown of the English Society of Orders: The Role of the Industrial Revolution
34153.zh_title: 英国等级社会的瓦解：工业革命的作用
34153.authors: Cara Ebert, Leander Heldring, James A. Robinson, Sebastian Vollmer
34153.abstract: We study the role of the English Industrial Revolution in promoting social mobility and ending the society of orders: one based on rigid social categories and regulated by inherited characteristics. We combine two new datasets on individual wealth holdings before and after the Industrial Revolution. Our main finding is that noble and gentry titles as well as surnames explain significantly less of the variation in wealth after the Industrial Revolution. Moreover, these declines are substantially larger in the parts of England most impacted by the Revolution. We also explore the extent to which different characteristics predict being rich. We then study a key facet of this increased social mobility - geographical and occupational mobility. We show that people with surnames that were more mobile tended to be in the north and working in manufacturing. Moreover, areas that experienced greater outward mobility were more urbanized; less agrarian; had institutionalized markets; more gentry; were poorer (as proxied by tax revenues); and were more likely to be the residence of a member of parliament.
34153.zh_abstract: 我们研究了英国工业革命在促进社会流动性和终结等级社会（一种基于僵化社会类别并由继承特征规范的社会）中的作用。我们整合了工业革命前后关于个人财富持有的两个新数据集。主要发现是，工业革命后，贵族和乡绅头衔以及姓氏对财富变异的解释力显著下降。此外，这些下降在受工业革命影响最大的英格兰地区更为显著。我们还探讨了不同特征在多大程度上预测成为富人。随后，我们研究了这种增强的社会流动性的一个关键方面——地理和职业流动性。研究表明，姓氏流动性较高的人往往居住在北部地区并从事制造业。此外，向外流动性较大的地区城市化程度更高；农业化程度更低；拥有制度化市场；乡绅更多；更贫困（以税收收入衡量）；并且更可能是议会议员的居住地。

34152.title: Can Cash Transfers Save Lives? Evidence from a Large-Scale Experiment in Kenya
34152.zh_title: 现金转移能拯救生命吗？来自肯尼亚大规模实验的证据
34152.authors: Michael W. Walker, Nick Shankar, Edward Miguel, Dennis Egger, Grady Killeen
34152.abstract: We estimate the impacts of large-scale unconditional cash transfers on child survival. One-time transfers of USD 1000 were provided to over 10,500 poor households across 653 randomized villages in Kenya. We collected census data on over 100,000 births, including on mortality and cause of death, and detailed data on health behaviors. Unconditional cash transfers (accounting for spillovers) lead to 48% fewer infant deaths before age one and 45% fewer child deaths before age five. These improvements appear to arise from better maternal health and nutrition, a 53% reduction in labor supply around the time of childbirth, and a 45% increase in hospital delivery. There is a transient 10% increase in fertility, but mortality reductions are largest in households receiving transfers after pregnancies began, ruling out selection bias. Mortality effects dissipate rapidly when cash is distributed more than three months from the birth. Mortality reductions are concentrated among households with limited (monetary) consumption gains, suggesting a trade-off between financial and health investments.
34152.zh_abstract: 我们估计了大规模无条件现金转移对儿童生存的影响。在肯尼亚653个随机村庄中，向超过10500个贫困家庭提供了一次性1000美元的转移支付。我们收集了超过10万例出生的人口普查数据，包括死亡率和死因，以及健康行为的详细数据。无条件现金转移（考虑溢出效应）使一岁以下婴儿死亡人数减少48%，五岁以下儿童死亡人数减少45%。这些改善似乎源于更好的孕产妇健康和营养、分娩前后劳动力供给减少53%以及医院分娩增加45%。生育率暂时性上升10%，但死亡率下降在怀孕后收到转移支付的家庭中最大，排除了选择偏差。当现金在出生前超过三个月发放时，死亡率效应迅速消散。死亡率下降集中在（货币）消费收益有限的家庭，表明金融投资与健康投资之间存在权衡。

34151.title: Information Frictions and the Labor Market for Public School Teachers
34151.zh_title: 信息摩擦与公立学校教师劳动力市场
34151.abstract: Information frictions—where a worker and her current employer know more about the worker’s productivity than prospective employers—have complex equity-efficiency implications in the teacher labor market. Reducing information frictions may make it easier for effective teachers to move to their preferred schools and increase cross-school inequality, but it may also attract high-quality entrants and improve market-level teacher quality. Taking these factors into account, we develop an equilibrium model of the teacher labor market and estimate it using data from the Houston Independent School District, which launched a transparent teacher evaluation system in 2011. Counterfactual simulations reveal that (1) making district teachers’ quality observable to all district schools improves average teacher quality at the district level and in the top and bottom quartiles of schools ranked by student performance, while decreasing it in other schools; (2) budget-neutral bonus programs that incentivize high-quality teachers to teach in low-performing schools can increase overall teacher quality and reduce cross-school inequalities; and (3) these programs are more effective in markets with cross-employer information symmetry.
34151.zh_abstract: 信息摩擦——即工人及其现任雇主比潜在雇主更了解工人生产力——在教师劳动力市场中具有复杂的公平与效率影响。减少信息摩擦可能使高效教师更容易流动到心仪学校，并加剧校际不平等，但也可能吸引高质量新入职者并提升市场整体教师质量。综合考虑这些因素，我们构建了一个教师劳动力市场均衡模型，并使用休斯顿独立学区的数据（该学区于2011年启动了透明的教师评估系统）进行估计。反事实模拟显示：（1）使学区教师的素质对所有学区学校可见，可提高学区层面以及按学生成绩排名前四分之一和后四分之一学校的平均教师质量，但会降低其他学校的教师质量；（2）预算中立的奖金计划激励高质量教师在表现不佳的学校任教，可提高整体教师质量并减少校际不平等；（3）这些计划在跨雇主信息对称的市场中更为有效。
34151.meta: Programs：ED, IO, LS, PE；JEL：H0, I2, J01, J20, J45

34150.title: Deforestation: A Global and Dynamic Perspective
34150.zh_title: 森林砍伐：全球动态视角
34150.authors: Farid Farrokhi, Elliot Kang, Heitor S. Pellegrina, Sebastian Sotelo
34150.abstract: We study deforestation in a dynamic world trade system. We first document that between 1990-2020: (i) global forest area has decreased by 7.1 percent, with large heterogeneity across countries, (ii) deforestation is associated with expansions of agricultural land use, (iii) deforestation is larger in countries with a comparative advantage in agriculture, and (iv) population growth causes deforestation. Motivated by these facts, we build a model in which structural change and comparative advantage determine the extent, location, and timing of deforestation. Using the model, we obtain conditions under which reductions in trade costs and tariffs reduce global deforestation. Quantitatively, eliminating global agricultural tariffs has limited impacts on global forest area, leads to substantial forest reallocation across countries, and results in net welfare benefits
34150.zh_abstract: 我们在动态世界贸易体系中研究森林砍伐。首先，我们记录了1990-2020年间：（i）全球森林面积减少了7.1%，各国之间存在巨大异质性，（ii）森林砍伐与农业用地扩张相关，（iii）森林砍伐在农业具有比较优势的国家更为严重，（iv）人口增长导致森林砍伐。受这些事实启发，我们构建了一个模型，其中结构变化和比较优势决定了森林砍伐的程度、地点和时间。利用该模型，我们得出了贸易成本和关税降低减少全球森林砍伐的条件。定量分析表明，消除全球农业关税对全球森林面积影响有限，但会导致各国间森林大量重新配置，并带来净福利收益。

34149.title: Selective Turnout, Voting Policy, and Partisan Bias: Evidence from Multi-Level Data
34149.zh_title: 选择性投票、投票政策与党派偏见：来自多层次数据的证据
34149.authors: Steven T. Berry, Christian Cox, Philip Haile
34149.abstract: We study voting in general elections for the U.S. House of Representatives. Our data set includes demographics and turnout of all registered voters for the years 2016–2020, as well as vote shares at the precinct and contest level. We estimate a Downsian voting model incorporating rich observed and unobserved heterogeneity at the voter and contest level. We find that voters with high perceived voting costs tend to favor Democrats, as do marginal voters in most districts. Variation in state voting policies accounts for a modest share of overall estimated voting costs but is sufficient to determine the majority party in some years. We also find that many states’ district maps favor one party in converting votes to seats. On net, these biases favor Republicans. For example, we estimate that winning 50% of votes in every state would give Republicans a nine percentage point seat advantage in the House.
34149.zh_abstract: 我们研究了美国众议院大选中的投票行为。数据集包括2016-2020年所有登记选民的人口统计信息和投票率，以及选区和竞选层面的得票率。我们估计了一个唐斯式投票模型，该模型融入了选民和竞选层面丰富的可观测与不可观测异质性。研究发现，感知投票成本高的选民倾向于支持民主党，大多数选区的边际选民也是如此。各州投票政策的差异在总体估计投票成本中占比不大，但在某些年份足以决定多数党。我们还发现，许多州的选区划分在将选票转化为席位时偏向某一党派。净效应上，这些偏见有利于共和党。例如，我们估计，如果在每个州赢得50%的选票，共和党将在众议院获得9个百分点的席位优势。

34148.title: FinTech Lending and Cashless Payments
34148.zh_title: 金融科技贷款与无现金支付
34148.authors: Pulak Ghosh, Boris Vallee, Yao Zeng
34148.abstract: Borrowers’ use of cashless payments improves their access to capital from FinTech lenders and predicts a lower probability of default. These relationships are stronger for cashless technologies providing more precise information, and for outflows. Cashless payment usage complements other signals of borrower quality. We rationalize these empirical findings using a framework in which borrowers signal their lower likelihood of diverting cash flows through payment technology choice, and screening accuracy is further strengthened by informational complementarities. The informational synergy we uncover provides a rationale for the joint rise of cashless payments and FinTech lending, as well as for open banking.
34148.zh_abstract: 借款人使用无现金支付提高了他们从金融科技贷款机构获得资本的机会，并预示着较低的违约概率。这些关系对于提供更精确信息的无现金技术以及资金流出更为显著。无现金支付的使用补充了借款人质量的其他信号。我们通过一个框架对这些实证发现进行了合理化解释，在该框架中，借款人通过支付技术选择来传递其较低现金流转移可能性的信号，而信息互补性进一步增强了筛选准确性。我们揭示的信息协同效应为无现金支付和金融科技贷款的同步兴起以及开放银行提供了理论依据。

34147.title: Has the Rise of Work from Home Reduced the Motherhood Penalty in the Labor Market?
34147.zh_title: 居家办公的兴起是否减轻了劳动力市场中的母亲惩罚？
34147.abstract: When women become mothers, they often take a step back from their careers. Could work from home (WFH) reduce this motherhood penalty, particularly in traditionally family-unfriendly careers? We leverage technological changes prior to the pandemic that increased the feasibility of WFH in some college degrees but not others. In degrees where WFH increased, motherhood gaps in employment narrowed: for every 10% increase in WFH, mothers’ employment rates increased by 0.78 per centage points (or 0.94%) relative to other women’s. This change is driven by majors linked to careers that have high returns to hours and inflexible demands on workers’ time. We microfound these results using panel data that show that women who could WFH before childbirth are less likely to exit the workforce.
34147.zh_abstract: 当女性成为母亲时，她们往往会在职业生涯中退步。居家办公能否减轻这种母亲惩罚，尤其是在传统上对家庭不友好的职业中？我们利用了疫情前技术变革，这些变革提高了某些大学学位（而非其他学位）中居家办公的可行性。在居家办公增加的学位中，母亲在就业方面的差距缩小了：居家办公每增加10%，母亲的就业率相对于其他女性提高0.78个百分点（或0.94%）。这一变化由与高工时回报和灵活时间要求低的职业相关的专业驱动。我们使用面板数据对这些结果进行了微观基础分析，显示在生育前能够居家办公的女性更不容易退出劳动力市场。

34146.title: Intermediaries and Asset Prices
34146.abstract: Intermediary asset pricing posits that financial institutions are important players in financial markets, and that their decisions shape asset prices beyond simply reflecting the preferences of the average household in the economy. We explain how the intermediary-asset pricing approach helps make sense of empirical patterns in the data: the excess volatility of asset prices, differences in price movements across asset classes, the cross section of expected returns within asset classes, and specific arbitrages and price dislocations. We also review how this view of price fluctuations has important implications for macroeconomic dynamics, international economics, and policy. In particular, the role of financial regulation and monetary policy in alleviating constraints or removing risk from intermediary balance sheets during periods of stress is central in this approach. We highlight both existing progress and gaps for future research.
34146.zh_abstract: 中介资产定价理论认为，金融机构是金融市场的重要参与者，它们的决策塑造了资产价格，而不仅仅是反映经济中普通家庭的偏好。我们解释了中介资产定价方法如何帮助理解数据中的经验模式：资产价格的过度波动、不同资产类别价格变动的差异、资产类别内部的预期收益率横截面，以及特定的套利和价格错位。我们还回顾了这种价格波动观点如何对宏观经济动态、国际经济学和政策产生重要影响。特别是，金融监管和货币政策在压力时期缓解约束或消除中介资产负债表风险的作用，是该方法的核心。我们既强调了现有进展，也指出了未来研究的空白。
34146.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG；JEL：E44, G0, G01, G1, G2

34145.title: A Model of the Babbage Firm
34145.abstract: This paper develops a unified model of the cognitive division of labour in a knowledge economy. Building on recent frameworks for knowledge creation and decision making under uncertainty, it distinguishes between specialists, who engage in costly “on the spot” reasoning to generate tacit knowledge around a focal point, and generalists, who search for and interpolate existing knowledge but deliver answers subject to error. The model characterises how these two types of workers should be allocated across a continuum of questions, given the location of codified knowledge points and the distribution of problems. It shows that optimal task assignment depends on the cognitive process through which information is processed rather than on skill endowments or task complexity. When specialists operate around both knowledge points, their allocation is shaped by their absolute advantage over generalists, leading to non‐contiguous specialist domains interspersed with generalist regions. When specialists cluster around a single point, a natural boundary emerges between specialist and generalist domains that shifts but persists despite changes in question distribution. Extending the analysis to a two‐period setting, the paper identifies when specialists should sacrifice static efficiency to codify their tacit discoveries, creating bridges that allow generalists to operate more effectively in the future. These results provide a formal microfoundation for Babbage’s insights into the division of cognitive labour and offer predictions about how knowledge work responds to changes in the knowledge environment, the distribution of questions, and the patience of capital.
34145.zh_abstract: 本文构建了一个知识经济中认知劳动分工的统一模型。基于近期关于不确定性下知识创造与决策制定的框架，本文区分了专家与通才：专家围绕一个焦点进行成本高昂的“现场”推理以生成隐性知识，而通才则搜索并插值现有知识，但提供的答案可能存在错误。该模型刻画了在给定编码知识点的位置和问题分布的情况下，这两类工人应如何在一系列连续的问题上进行分配。模型表明，最优任务分配取决于信息处理的认知过程，而非技能禀赋或任务复杂度。当专家围绕两个知识点运作时，他们的分配由其相对于通才的绝对优势决定，导致专家领域非连续，并与通才区域交错分布。当专家聚集于单个点时，专家与通才领域之间会出现一个自然边界，该边界会移动，但即使问题分布发生变化也依然存在。将分析扩展到两期设定后，本文识别出专家何时应牺牲静态效率来编码其隐性发现，从而创建桥梁，使通才在未来能够更有效地运作。这些结果为巴贝奇关于认知劳动分工的见解提供了正式微观基础，并预测了知识工作如何响应知识环境、问题分布以及资本耐心的变化。

34144.title: The Great Gatsby Curve: Upward Mobility, Persistence and Inequality
34144.zh_title: 盖茨比曲线：向上流动性、持续性与不平等
34144.authors: Laura Mayoral, Debraj Ray, Garance Genicot
34144.abstract: This paper revisits the Great Gatsby curve that connects inequality to mobility, using panel data spanning several countries and time periods. Existing literature observes that the intergenerational elasticity of earnings falls as inequality rises, implying that mobility (viewed as the negative of that elasticity) is negatively correlated with inequality. In sharp contrast, we show that measures of upward mobility, axiomatically aligned with progressivity in income growth rates, are robustly and positively associated with baseline inequality. While there is no contradiction here, our study highlights crucial differences between mobility measures based on (lower) persistence and those based on growth progressivity, and asks the reader to align their choice of measure with foundational criteria that they feel best describe “mobility". Our findings offer a re-interpretation of the Gatsby curve through the lens of shared prosperity, and have implications for the evolution of inequality within countries.
34144.zh_abstract: 本文利用涵盖多个国家和时间段的面板数据，重新审视了连接不平等与流动性的盖茨比曲线。现有文献观察到，代际收入弹性随不平等上升而下降，这意味着流动性（被视为该弹性的负值）与不平等负相关。与此形成鲜明对比的是，我们表明，与收入增长率累进性公理一致的向上流动性衡量指标，与基期不平等稳健且正相关。虽然这里并无矛盾，但我们的研究强调了基于（较低）持续性的流动性衡量指标与基于增长累进性的指标之间的关键差异，并请读者根据他们认为最能描述“流动性”的基础标准来选择衡量指标。我们的发现通过共享繁荣的视角重新诠释了盖茨比曲线，并对国家内部不平等的演变具有启示意义。

34143.title: Tariffs and State Capacity: A Specific Example
34143.zh_title: 关税与国家能力：一个具体例子
34143.authors: Erik Madsen, Martin Rotemberg, Sharon Traiberman, Shizhuo Wang
34143.abstract: Evasion is a key obstacle to raising customs revenue. We study how improved administrative capacity enables governments to combat evasion by redesigning tariff codes. Using newly compiled historical records from the Early American Republic, we show that as Customs administration matured, the tariff code became more complex and more reliant on specific (quantity-based) tariffs in preference to ad valorem (value-based) ones. We develop an equilibrium model of tariff administration with costly verification of declared values that explains these twin trends: Administrative capacity allows Customs officials to disaggregate goods and assess tailored specific tariffs, obviating misvaluation while minimizing price distortions. The model successfully predicts several additional empirical patterns: Specific tariffs tend to be assessed on goods that are homogeneous, cheap, or lightly taxed.
34143.zh_abstract: 逃税是提高海关收入的主要障碍。我们研究了行政能力的提升如何使政府能够通过重新设计关税税则来打击逃税。利用新整理的美国早期共和国历史记录，我们表明，随着海关行政管理日趋成熟，关税税则变得更加复杂，并且更倾向于依赖从量税（基于数量）而非从价税（基于价值）。我们构建了一个关税行政的均衡模型，其中对申报价值的核实成本高昂，该模型解释了这两个并行趋势：行政能力使海关官员能够细分商品并评估量身定制的从量税，从而避免错误估值并最小化价格扭曲。该模型成功预测了另外几个经验模式：从量税往往适用于同质、廉价或低税率商品。

34142.title: The Global Gender Distortions Index (GGDI)
34142.authors: Pinelopi K. Goldberg, Charles TL. Gottlieb, Somik Lall, Meet Mehta, Michael Peters, Aishwarya Lakshmi Ratan
34142.abstract: The extent to which women participate in the labor market varies greatly across the globe. If such differences reflect distortions that women face in accessing good jobs, they can reduce economic activity through a misallocation of talent. In this paper, we build on Hsieh et al. (2019) to provide a methodology to quantify these productivity consequences. The index we propose, the ”Global Gender Distortions Index (GGDI)”, measures the losses in aggregate productivity that gender-based misallocation imposes. Our index allows us to separately identify labor demand distortions (e.g., discrimination in hiring for formal jobs) from labor supply distortions (e.g., frictions that discourage women’s labor force participation) and can be computed using data on labor income and job types. Our methodology also highlights an important distinction between welfare-relevant misallocation and the consequences on aggregate GDP if misallocation arises between market work and non-market activities. To showcase the versatility of our index, we analyze gender misallocation within countries over time, across countries over the development spectrum, and across local labor markets within countries. We find that misallocation is substantial and that demand distortions account for most of the productivity losses.
34142.zh_abstract: 女性参与劳动力市场的程度在全球范围内差异巨大。如果这些差异反映了女性在获得好工作方面面临的扭曲，那么它们可能通过人才错配降低经济活动。在本文中，我们基于Hsieh等人（2019）的研究，提供了一种量化这些生产率后果的方法。我们提出的指数——“全球性别扭曲指数（GGDI）”——衡量了基于性别的错配所造成的总生产率损失。我们的指数使我们能够分别识别劳动力需求扭曲（例如，正式工作招聘中的歧视）和劳动力供给扭曲（例如，阻碍女性劳动参与率的摩擦），并且可以使用劳动收入和职业类型的数据进行计算。我们的方法还强调了福利相关的错配与错配发生在市场工作和非市场活动之间时对总GDP影响之间的一个重要区别。为了展示我们指数的多功能性，我们分析了国家内部随时间推移的性别错配、处于不同发展阶段的跨国性别错配，以及国家内部地方劳动力市场的性别错配。我们发现错配程度相当大，并且需求扭曲造成了大部分的生产率损失。

34141.title: Public Procurement vs. Regulated Competition in Selection Markets
34141.zh_title: 选择市场中的公共采购与受监管竞争
34141.abstract: A common approach to markets with adverse selection is to regulate competition to minimize inefficiencies, while preserving consumer choice among firms. We study the role of procurement auctions—leading to sole provision by the winning firm—as an alternative market design. Relative to regulated competition, auctions affect product variety, quality, markups, and remove cream-skimming incentives. We develop a framework to study this comparison and apply it to individual health insurance in the US. We find that procurement auctions would increase consumer welfare in most markets, mainly by limiting inefficiencies from adverse selection and market power, and by increasing quality.
34141.zh_abstract: 应对逆向选择市场的一种常见方法是监管竞争以最小化低效率，同时保留消费者在企业间的选择权。我们研究了采购拍卖（导致中标企业独家供应）作为一种替代市场设计的作用。相对于受监管竞争，拍卖会影响产品多样性、质量、加成率，并消除撇脂动机。我们构建了一个框架来研究这种比较，并将其应用于美国的个人健康保险市场。我们发现，采购拍卖在大多数市场中会提高消费者福利，这主要通过限制逆向选择和市场势力带来的低效率以及提高质量来实现。

34140.title: Economic Incentives and Organ Procurement: Evidence from a U.S. Reform
34140.zh_title: 经济激励与器官获取：来自美国改革的证据
34140.authors: Erkut Y. Ozbay, Ariel Rava, Sergio S. Urzúa, Emanuel Zur
34140.abstract: In 2019, the United States implemented new regulations for Organ Procurement Organizations (OPOs) aimed at increasing transparency and strengthening accountability. These rules introduced stronger performance incentives designed to improve organ procurement outcomes. This paper examines the impact of the reform on organ donations, transplant activity, and associated system costs, with a particular focus on kidneys, given their clinical characteristics and the structure of the reform’s organizational incentives. We estimate that the new policy led to an average increase of 7.13 kidneys procured per OPO per month, relative to a baseline mean of 24.78. The largest effects are observed among top-performing OPOs prior to the reform, with similar patterns for transplanted organs. Consistent with these findings, we document an overall rise in total OPO costs, with statistically significant increases concentrated among low-performing OPOs. Finally, we present a back-of-the-envelope calculation estimating the fiscal impact of the reform.
34140.zh_abstract: 2019年，美国对器官获取组织（OPO）实施了旨在提高透明度和加强问责制的新规定。这些规则引入了更强的绩效激励，旨在改善器官获取结果。本文考察了该改革对器官捐赠、移植活动及相关系统成本的影响，特别关注肾脏，这是基于其临床特征以及改革组织激励的结构。我们估计，相对于改革前每月平均24.78个肾脏的基线水平，新政策导致每个OPO每月平均多获取7.13个肾脏。改革前表现最佳的OPO效果最大，移植器官也呈现类似模式。与这些发现一致，我们记录了OPO总成本的总体上升，其中统计上显著的增加集中在表现不佳的OPO。最后，我们通过一个粗略计算来估算改革的财政影响。

34139.title: What Do (Thousands of) Unions Do? Union-Specific Pay Premia and Inequality
34139.zh_title: （数千个）工会做什么？工会特定工资溢价与不平等
34139.authors: Ellora Derenoncourt, François Gerard, Lorenzo Lagos, Claire Montialoux
34139.abstract: We study the role of union heterogeneity in shaping wages and inequality among unionized workers. Using linked employer-employee data from Brazil and job moves across multi-firm unions, we estimate over 4,800 union-specific pay premia. Unions explain 3–4% of earnings variation. While unions raise wages on average, the standard deviation in union effects is large (6–7%). Validating our approach, wages fall in markets with higher vs. lower union premia following a nationwide right-to-work law. Linking premia to detailed data on union attributes, we find that unions with strike activity, collective bargaining agreements, internal competition, and skilled leaders secure higher wages. High-premium unions compress wage gaps by education while the average union exacerbates them. Post right-to-work, however, worker support for high-premium unions falls when between-group bargaining differentials are large. Our findings show that unions are not a monolith—their structure and actions shape their wage effects and, consequently, worker support.
34139.zh_abstract: 我们研究了工会异质性在塑造工会工人工资和不平等中的作用。利用巴西的关联雇主-雇员数据以及跨多企业工会的工作流动，我们估计了超过4800个工会特定的工资溢价。工会解释了3-4%的收入差异。虽然工会平均提高了工资，但工会效应的标准差很大（6-7%）。验证我们的方法，在一项全国性的工作权法之后，工会溢价较高市场的工资相对于较低市场有所下降。将溢价与工会属性的详细数据联系起来，我们发现，有罢工活动、集体谈判协议、内部竞争以及有技能领导者的工会能获得更高的工资。高溢价工会压缩了按教育程度划分的工资差距，而普通工会则加剧了这一差距。然而，在工作权法之后，当组间谈判差异较大时，工人对高溢价工会的支持度下降。我们的发现表明，工会并非铁板一块——它们的结构和行动塑造了其工资效应，并进而影响了工人的支持。

34138.title: Partial Language Acquisition: The Impact of Conformity
34138.zh_title: 部分语言习得：从众效应的影响
34138.authors: William A. Brock, Bo Chen, Steven N. Durlauf, Shlomo Weber
34138.abstract: This paper analyzes patterns of majority language acquisition in an economy consisting of a majority group and multiple minority groups. We consider contexts in which allows individuals choose among three options: full learning, partial learning, or no learning of the majority language. The key innovation in our approach is the introduction of a conformity factor in language acquisition, where peer pressure and community status may outweigh communicative and economic incentives for some individuals. Notably, we identify a non-monotonic relationship between the level of conformity and the distribution of full learners, partial learners, and non-learners in equilibrium. This finding is significant for policy considerations, as small adjustments in language acquisition costs may unpredictably influence language acquisition patterns across minority groups.
34138.zh_abstract: 本文分析了一个由多数群体和多个少数群体组成的经济体中，多数语言习得的模式。我们考虑了个体可以在三种选项中进行选择的情境：完全学习、部分学习或不学习多数语言。我们方法的关键创新在于引入了语言习得中的从众因素，即同伴压力和社群地位可能对某些个体而言，超过沟通和经济激励。值得注意的是，我们识别出从众水平与均衡中完全学习者、部分学习者和非学习者的分布之间存在非单调关系。这一发现对政策考量具有重要意义，因为语言习得成本的小幅调整可能会不可预测地影响少数群体的语言习得模式。
34138.meta: Programs：DEV, EFG, LS；JEL：C72, D61, J15, Z13

34137.title: Social Defaults and Plan Choice: The Case of Spousal Following
34137.zh_title: 社会默认选项与计划选择：配偶跟随的案例
34137.authors: Tal Gross, Timothy Layton, Daniel Prinz, Julia Yates
34137.abstract: We study how couples in the Medicare Part D program choose an insurance plan. Over 70 percent of enrollees choose the same plan as their spouse. Even among those with differing healthcare needs, well over half do so. Discrete-choice models suggest beneficiaries value being on the same plan as their spouse at over a thousand dollars per year. Using a regression-discontinuity design, we show that younger spouses disproportionately follow their older spouse’s plan choice. Joint plan choice contributes modestly to overall overspending, but increases costs substantially for the couples with different cost-minimizing plans.
34137.zh_abstract: 我们研究了参加Medicare D部分计划的夫妇如何选择保险计划。超过70%的参保者选择了与其配偶相同的计划。即使在医疗需求不同的夫妇中，也有超过一半的人这样做。离散选择模型表明，受益人每年愿意支付超过一千美元来与配偶选择相同的计划。利用断点回归设计，我们显示较年轻的配偶不成比例地跟随其年长配偶的计划选择。联合计划选择对总体过度支出贡献不大，但对于那些成本最小化计划不同的夫妇，它显著增加了成本。

34136.title: Intermediaries in Decentralized Markets: Evidence from Used-Car Transactions
34136.zh_title: 分散市场中的中介：来自二手车交易的证据
34136.authors: Fei Li, Charles Murry, Can Tian, Yiyi Zhou
34136.abstract: We develop and estimate a spatial search-and-bargaining model to study the role of intermediaries and spatial frictions using data from the used-car market. We find that dealers earn price premiums by leveraging three key advantages: selective acquisition of higher-quality cars, superior matching efficiency, and greater bargaining power. Counterfactual simulations reveal that selective intermediation and spatial segmentation significantly affect market efficiency and consumer welfare. While dealers extract more surplus per transaction than sellers, policies reducing dealers' advantages increase search frictions and lower overall welfare. Counterintuitively, reducing spatial frictions harms consumers by shifting trade to less efficient private-seller channels.
34136.zh_abstract: 我们利用二手车市场的数据，开发并估计了一个空间搜索与讨价还价模型，以研究中介和空间摩擦的作用。我们发现，经销商通过利用三个关键优势来赚取价格溢价：选择性收购高质量汽车、优越的匹配效率以及更强的议价能力。反事实模拟显示，选择性中介和空间分割显著影响市场效率和消费者福利。虽然经销商每笔交易提取的剩余多于卖家，但减少经销商优势的政策会增加搜索摩擦并降低整体福利。与直觉相反，减少空间摩擦会通过将交易转向效率较低的私人卖家渠道而损害消费者。

34135.title: Vertical Integration and Consumer Choice: Evidence from a Field Experiment
34135.zh_title: 垂直整合与消费者选择：来自实地实验的证据
34135.authors: Chiara Farronato, Andrey Fradkin, Alexander MacKay
34135.abstract: Digital platforms offer consumers vertically integrated products alongside third-party alternatives. Using a field experiment that hides Amazon brands, we quantify the impacts of vertical integration—through both the availability of private labels and their placement in search results. In their absence, consumers choose similar products with no increase in search effort or cross-platform substitution. Yet some consumers prefer Amazon brands, and removing these products reduces consumer welfare by 5.5 percent. Contrary to concerns about self-preferencing, demoting Amazon brands in search results does not increase welfare, as heterogeneous preferences make their prominent placement valuable to a meaningful share of consumers.
34135.zh_abstract: 数字平台向消费者提供垂直整合产品以及第三方替代品。通过一项隐藏亚马逊品牌的实地实验，我们量化了垂直整合的影响——既通过自有品牌的可用性，也通过其在搜索结果中的位置。在没有这些品牌的情况下，消费者会选择类似的产品，且搜索努力或跨平台替代没有增加。然而，一些消费者偏好亚马逊品牌，移除这些产品会使消费者福利降低5.5%。与对自我偏好的担忧相反，在搜索结果中降低亚马逊品牌的排名并不会增加福利，因为异质性偏好使得其突出位置对相当一部分消费者具有价值。
34135.meta: Programs：IO, PR；JEL：C93, D12, K21, L13, L40, L81

34134.title: Culture and Health
34134.abstract: This chapter explores the multifaceted relationship between culture and health from an economic perspective, integrating insights from anthropology, psychology, and political science. It begins by examining how culture provides meaning to illness and suffering and explores how culturally grounded “disease theory systems” influence beliefs about what causes illness, how and whether suffering should be remedied, and the appropriate role of the state in allocating health care resources. The importance of culture in defining the boundary between normal and abnormal pathology is highlighted via case studies. The chapter next reviews evidence on how health behaviors such as smoking, firearm ownership, dietary practices, and reproductive decisions are influenced by cultural norms of masculinity and religiosity. Lastly, it examines how firms, governments, and civil society leverage and advance cultural narratives to influence individual behavior and public policy. Thus, culture in relation to health both naturally evolves and is actively constructed, with implications for health inequality and health policy.
34134.zh_abstract: 本章从经济学视角探讨文化与健康之间的多方面关系，整合了人类学、心理学和政治学的见解。首先考察文化如何为疾病和痛苦赋予意义，并探讨基于文化的“疾病理论体系”如何影响关于疾病成因、痛苦应如何以及是否应被治愈的信念，以及国家在分配医疗资源中的适当角色。通过案例研究，强调了文化在界定正常与异常病理之间边界的重要性。本章接下来回顾了关于吸烟、枪支拥有、饮食习惯和生育决策等健康行为如何受到男性气质和宗教信仰等文化规范影响的证据。最后，考察了企业、政府和公民社会如何利用和推进文化叙事来影响个人行为和公共政策。因此，与健康相关的文化既自然演化也被积极构建，这对健康不平等和健康政策具有影响。
34134.meta: Programs：DEV, EH, POL；JEL：H10, I1, I11, I12, I13, I14, I18, P0, P50

34133.title: Decomposing Trends in the Gender Gap for Highly Educated Workers
34133.zh_title: 高学历工人性别差距趋势的分解
34133.authors: Joseph G. Altonji, John Eric Humphries, Yagmur Yuksel, Ling Zhong
34133.abstract: This paper examines the gender gap in log earnings among full-time, college-educated workers born between 1931 and 1984. Using data from the National Survey of College Graduates and other sources, we decompose the gender earnings gap across birth cohorts into three components: (i) gender differences in the relative returns to undergraduate and graduate fields, (ii) gender-specific trends in undergraduate field, graduate degree attainment, and graduate field, and (iii) a cohort-specific “residual component” that shifts the gender gap uniformly across all college graduates. We have three main findings. First, when holding the relative returns to fields constant, changes in fields of study contribute 0.128 to the decline in the gender gap. However, this decline is partially offset by cohort trends in the relative returns to specific fields that favored men over women, reducing the contribution of field-of-study changes to the decline to 0.055. Second, gender differences in the relative returns to undergraduate and graduate fields of study contribute to the earnings gap, but they play a limited role in explaining its decline over time. Third, much of the convergence in earnings between the 1931 and 1950 cohorts is due to a declining “residual component.” The residual component remains stable for cohorts born between 1951 and the late 1970s, after which it resumes its decline.
34133.zh_abstract: 本文考察了出生于1931年至1984年间的全职大学毕业生中，对数收入的性别差距。利用全国大学毕业生调查及其他来源的数据，我们将不同出生队列的性别收入差距分解为三个组成部分：(i) 本科和研究生领域相对回报的性别差异，(ii) 本科领域、研究生学位获得和研究生领域的性别特定趋势，以及(iii) 一个队列特定的“残差成分”，它均匀地改变所有大学毕业生的性别差距。我们有三个主要发现。首先，当保持各领域的相对回报不变时，学习领域的变化对性别差距的缩小贡献了0.128。然而，这一下降被特定领域相对回报的队列趋势部分抵消，该趋势有利于男性而非女性，将学习领域变化对下降的贡献减少到0.055。其次，本科和研究生学习领域相对回报的性别差异对收入差距有贡献，但在解释其随时间下降方面作用有限。第三，1931年至1950年出生队列之间收入趋同的大部分原因是“残差成分”的下降。对于1951年至1970年代末出生的队列，残差成分保持稳定，之后它再次开始下降。
34133.meta: Programs：ED, LS；JEL：I24, I26, J16, J31, J7, N32

34132.title: Control Without Ownership: Governance of Nonprofit Hospitals
34132.zh_title: 无所有权的控制：非营利医院的治理
34132.authors: Katharina Lewellen, Gordon M. Phillips, Giorgo Sertsios
34132.abstract: We analyze the governance of nonprofit hospitals, focusing on the external mechanism through the market for corporate control. Relative to for-profits, nonprofit boards are larger, have more employee directors, less industry expertise, and weaker incentives; CEO pay and turnover are less responsive to performance. Nonprofit takeovers are followed by insiders’ departures. However, nonprofits with poor financial performance are half as likely as for-profits to be acquired, and nonfinancial performance is unrelated to acquisitions. Oversight strength explains a substantial share of the takeover gap. While nonprofits may deliver stakeholder benefits, our evidence points to limits to governance as an associated cost.
34132.zh_abstract: 我们分析了非营利医院的治理，重点关注通过公司控制权市场的外部机制。相对于营利性医院，非营利医院的董事会规模更大，拥有更多员工董事，行业专业知识更少，激励更弱；CEO薪酬和更替对业绩的敏感性较低。非营利医院的收购伴随着内部人员的离职。然而，财务业绩不佳的非营利医院被收购的可能性仅为营利性医院的一半，而非财务业绩与收购无关。监管力度解释了收购差距的很大一部分。虽然非营利医院可能带来利益相关者福利，但我们的证据指出了治理作为相关成本的局限性。
34132.meta: Programs：CF, IO；JEL：G3, G30, G31, G34, G38

34131.title: The Extraordinary Rise in the Wealth of Older American Households
34131.zh_title: 美国老年家庭财富的异常增长
34131.abstract: There has been a seismic shift in age-wealth profiles in the U.S. over years 1983 to 2022. The most notable is the sharp rise in the relative household wealth of age group 75 and over. Correspondingly, the relative wealth holdings of all other age groups dropped over these years. Using the Survey of Consumer Finances, the paper focuses on the youngest age group, 35 and under, and the oldest age group, 75 and over, and analyzes the factors behind these relative shifts in wealth. I find that the three principal factors are the homeownership rate, total stocks directly and indirectly owned, and home mortgage debt. The homeownership rate is the same in the two years for the youngest group but falls relative to the overall rate, whereas it shoots up for the oldest group both in actual level and relative to the overall average. The value of stock holdings rises for both age groups but vastly more for the oldest households compared to the youngest ones and accounts for a substantial portion of the elderly’s relative wealth gains. Mortgage debt rises in dollar terms for both groups but considerably more in relative terms for the youngest group.
34131.zh_abstract: 从1983年到2022年，美国的年龄-财富曲线发生了巨大变化。最显著的是75岁及以上年龄组家庭相对财富的急剧上升。相应地，所有其他年龄组的相对财富持有量在这些年间下降了。利用消费者金融调查数据，本文聚焦于最年轻的年龄组（35岁及以下）和最年长的年龄组（75岁及以上），并分析了这些相对财富变化背后的因素。我发现三个主要因素是：住房拥有率、直接和间接持有的股票总额，以及住房抵押贷款债务。对于最年轻组，住房拥有率在两年间相同，但相对于总体比率有所下降；而对于最年长组，无论是实际水平还是相对于总体平均水平，住房拥有率都大幅上升。两个年龄组的股票持有价值都有所上升，但最年长家庭的增长远大于最年轻家庭，这构成了老年人相对财富增长的很大一部分。两个年龄组的抵押贷款债务以美元计都有所上升，但最年轻组的相对增长要大得多。

34130.title: Financial Advisors and Investors' Bias
34130.zh_title: 财务顾问与投资者偏差
34130.authors: Marianne Andries, Maxime Bonelli, David Sraer
34130.abstract: We study an intervention by a brokerage firm providing advisory services to high-net-worth investors. In 2018, the firm changed the information displayed on its internal platform, so that financial advisors could no longer observe which clients’ holdings were in paper gain or loss. Using data on portfolio stock transactions between 2016 and 2021, we show that, while all investors exhibit a significant disposition effect before 2018, i.e., a greater propensity to realize gains than losses, highly-advised investors see their bias significantly reduced afterward. Our paper shows that by appropriately manipulating advisors’ information, financial firms can successfully reduce their clients’ biases.
34130.zh_abstract: 我们研究了一家为高净值投资者提供咨询服务的经纪公司所实施的一项干预措施。2018年，该公司更改了其内部平台显示的信息，使得财务顾问无法再观察到哪些客户的持仓处于账面盈利或亏损状态。利用2016年至2021年间的投资组合股票交易数据，我们表明，尽管所有投资者在2018年之前都表现出显著的处置效应，即更倾向于实现盈利而非亏损，但接受高度咨询的投资者在此之后其偏差显著减少。我们的论文表明，通过适当操控顾问的信息，金融公司能够成功减少客户的偏差。
34130.meta: Programs：AP, CF；JEL：G0, G02, G2, G20, G4, G41, G5

34129.title: Understanding Gaps in College Outcomes by First-Generation Status
34129.zh_title: 理解第一代大学生身份导致的大学成果差距
34129.authors: Esteban M. Aucejo, Jacob French, Paola Ugalde Araya, Basit Zafar
34129.abstract: Information frictions significantly shape students' academic trajectories, but their differential impact across student backgrounds remains understudied. Using a novel panel survey capturing incoming students' subjective expectations and anonymized transcript data from Arizona State University, we first show that parental education strongly predicts educational success, even after controlling for demographics and measurable college preparation. First-generation students enter college less informed and with more uncertain beliefs, facing substantial challenges stemming from limited understanding and uncertainty about the higher education setting. A Bayesian expected utility maximization model demonstrates that higher uncertainty alone can sustain persistent achievement gaps. Empirically, students update their beliefs and make academic decisions consistent with the model’s predictions. Finally, leveraging a natural experiment involving a targeted first-year experience program for academically marginal students, we demonstrate that cost-effective interventions can successfully reduce knowledge frictions, improve retention, and encourage beneficial early major switching.
34129.zh_abstract: 信息摩擦显著塑造了学生的学业轨迹，但其在不同学生背景下的差异化影响仍未得到充分研究。利用一项新颖的面板调查（该调查捕捉了亚利桑那州立大学新生的主观预期）以及匿名化的成绩单数据，我们首先表明，即使在控制了人口统计学特征和可测量的大学准备程度之后，父母的教育程度仍然强烈预测着教育成功。第一代大学生入学时信息更少，信念更不确定，面临着因对高等教育环境理解有限和不确定性而产生的重大挑战。一个贝叶斯期望效用最大化模型表明，仅凭更高的不确定性就能维持持久的成就差距。实证上，学生的信念更新和学术决策与模型的预测一致。最后，利用一项针对学业边缘学生的定向第一年体验项目的自然实验，我们证明了成本效益高的干预措施能够成功减少知识摩擦、提高保留率并鼓励有益的早期专业转换。

34128.title: The Dynamics of Deposit Flightiness and its Impact on Financial Stability
34128.zh_title: 存款流动性的动态及其对金融稳定的影响
34128.authors: Kristian Blickle, Jian Li, Xu Lu, Yiming Ma
34128.abstract: We document that deposit flightiness varies significantly over time, peaking after Covid-19. Elevated deposit flightiness coincides with QE and low interest rates. We rationalize these trends based on heterogeneity in investors’ convenience value. Investors in the banking system value the convenience benefits of deposits more than outside investors. Following deposit inflows, e.g., due to QE's reserve expansions, the marginal depositor in the banking system becomes less convenience seeking and the risk of panic runs increases. As a result, policy rate hikes are more destabilizing when preceded by QE. Our findings reveal a novel linkage between conventional and unconventional monetary policy.
34128.zh_abstract: 我们记录了存款流动性随时间显著变化，在新冠疫情后达到峰值。存款流动性升高与量化宽松和低利率时期相吻合。我们基于投资者便利价值的异质性来解释这些趋势。银行系统中的投资者比外部投资者更看重存款的便利性收益。在存款流入（例如，由于量化宽松导致的准备金扩张）之后，银行系统中的边际储户变得不那么追求便利性，恐慌性挤兑的风险增加。因此，当利率上调之前经历了量化宽松时，其破坏稳定的作用更大。我们的发现揭示了常规与非常规货币政策之间的一种新联系。
34128.meta: Programs：AP, CF, ME；JEL：E5, E50, G2, G21, G23

34127.title: Database, Methodological Tools, and Research Opportunities: Creative Destruction Lab and Early-Stage Technology Ventures
34127.zh_title: 数据库、方法论工具与研究机会：创意破坏实验室与早期技术创业公司
34127.authors: Amir Sariri, Evgenia Gatov, Geneva Neal, Kyle Robinson, Sonia Sennik, Wei Yang Tham, Michael Vertolli, Avi Goldfarb
34127.abstract: We introduce a new dataset built from a global non-profit startup program for early-stage high-technology startups called Creative Destruction Lab (CDL). The early stages of startup formation remain one of the least understood aspects of firm growth. The nature of this program and the data collected from its operations are well suited to investigate open questions in entrepreneurial strategy, entrepreneurial finance, advice, and technology transfer. This dataset combines three critical features for rigorous empirical research. First, the large, multi-year sample includes roughly 15,000 applicants, 9,000 founders in admitted startups, and nearly 2,000 mentors. Second, CDL recognized the academic value from the outset and built enterprise IT linking venture-level characteristics, structured longitudinal records of firm development and operations, and unstructured verbatim transcripts of mentor–founder discussions. Third, the data cover 27 technological domains such as therapeutics and quantum computing. This paper provides an overview of the setting from which data is collected, a high-level description of available data, and information on how to access these data for research.
34127.zh_abstract: 我们介绍了一个基于全球非营利性初创企业项目“创意破坏实验室”（CDL）构建的新数据集，该项目面向早期高科技初创企业。初创企业形成的早期阶段仍然是企业成长中最不为人知的方面之一。该项目的性质及其运营中收集的数据非常适合研究创业战略、创业金融、咨询和技术转让中的未解问题。该数据集结合了进行严谨实证研究的三个关键特征。首先，这个多年期的大样本包括大约15,000名申请者、9,000名被录取初创企业的创始人以及近2,000名导师。其次，CDL从一开始就认识到其学术价值，并构建了企业级信息技术系统，将创业层面的特征、公司发展和运营的结构化纵向记录以及导师与创始人讨论的非结构化逐字记录联系起来。第三，数据涵盖27个技术领域，例如治疗药物和量子计算。本文概述了数据收集的背景，对可用数据进行了高层次描述，并提供了如何获取这些数据用于研究的信息。

34126.title: Navigating the College Affordability Crisis: Insights from College Savings Accounts
34126.zh_title: 应对大学可负担性危机：来自大学储蓄账户的见解
34126.authors: Guglielmo Briscese, John A. List, Sabrina Liu
34126.abstract: With higher education costs consistently outpacing inflation and public funding declining, college affordability has become a critical barrier to economic mobility for middle- and low-income families. While College Savings Accounts (CSAs), or 529 plans, offer tax-advantaged vehicles for college savings, their adoption patterns and educational impacts remain poorly understood. Using comprehensive administrative data from over 900,000 Illinois 529 accounts (2000-2023) linked to educational outcomes, plus complementary surveys of account owners and parents, we provide the first large-scale analysis of CSA participation and effectiveness. We find that while CSA adoption has expanded to every ZIP code in Illinois, participation remains concentrated among higher-income, more educated families. Financial literacy emerges as a key barrier: 61% of parents who could save enough to cover half of future college costs still perceive their potential savings as meaningless. Among participants, higher savings are strongly correlated with better educational outcomes, including four-year college enrollment, attendance at selective institutions, and the pursuit of post-graduate degrees. These findings suggest that targeted interventions addressing financial literacy gaps and misperceptions about modest savings could significantly expand CSA effectiveness as a tool for educational equity. Beyond state-level 529 program optimization, our findings suggest several promising avenues for federal policy coordination and institutional innovation.
34126.zh_abstract: 随着高等教育成本持续超过通货膨胀率且公共资金减少，大学可负担性已成为中低收入家庭实现经济流动性的关键障碍。尽管大学储蓄账户（CSA）或529计划提供了用于大学储蓄的税收优惠工具，但其采用模式和教育影响仍然知之甚少。利用来自伊利诺伊州超过90万个529账户（2000-2023年）的全面行政数据（这些数据与教育成果相关联），再加上对账户持有人和家长的补充调查，我们首次对CSA的参与度和有效性进行了大规模分析。我们发现，虽然CSA的采用已扩展到伊利诺伊州的每个邮政编码区，但参与仍然集中在收入更高、受教育程度更高的家庭中。金融素养成为一个关键障碍：61%能够储蓄足够支付未来一半大学费用的家长仍然认为他们潜在的储蓄毫无意义。在参与者中，更高的储蓄与更好的教育成果密切相关，包括四年制大学入学率、进入选择性大学以及攻读研究生学位。这些发现表明，针对金融素养差距和对小额储蓄误解的定向干预措施，可以显著扩大CSA作为教育公平工具的有效性。除了州级529计划优化之外，我们的发现还为联邦政策协调和制度创新提出了几个有前景的方向。
34126.meta: Programs：ED, PE；JEL：D14, G53, H31, I22, I24

34125.title: Carbon Pricing and Inequality: A Normative Perspective
34125.zh_title: 碳定价与不平等：一个规范性的视角
34125.authors: Saki Bigio, Diego R. Känzig, Pablo Sánchez, Conor Walsh
34125.abstract: Despite broad acceptance among economists, carbon taxes face persistent public resistance. We measure the sources and distribution of welfare losses from unexpected European carbon price changes by estimating their impact on consumer prices, labor income, financial wealth, and government transfers. A 1% carbon-policy-induced increase in energy prices leads to an average welfare loss of about 0.5% of a household’s three-year consumption, primarily driven by indirect labor-income effects. Younger, poorer, and less educated households, especially in Southern and Eastern Europe, bear a disproportionate burden. These findings suggest public opposition to carbon taxes could stem from legitimate distributional concerns.
34125.zh_abstract: 尽管经济学家普遍接受，但碳税仍面临持续的公众阻力。我们通过估算意外欧洲碳价格变化对消费价格、劳动收入、金融财富和政府转移支付的影响，来衡量福利损失的来源和分布。由碳政策导致的能源价格每上涨1%，会导致家庭三年期消费的福利损失平均约为0.5%，这主要由间接的劳动收入效应驱动。较年轻、较贫穷和受教育程度较低的家庭，尤其是在南欧和东欧，承受了不成比例的负担。这些发现表明，公众对碳税的反对可能源于合理的分配关切。

34124.title: A Tale of Two Transitions: Mobility Dynamics in China and Russia after Central Planning
34124.zh_title: 两种转型的故事：中央计划后中国和俄罗斯的流动性动态
34124.authors: Kristina Butaeva, Lian Chen, Steven N. Durlauf, Albert Park
34124.abstract: This paper examines intergenerational mobility in China and Russia during their transitions from central planning to market systems. We consider mobility as movement captured by changes in status between parents and children. We provide estimates of overall mobility, which involves mobility during transition to a system's steady state, as well as steady state mobility, which captures long-run mobility independent of transitional dynamics or shifts in the marginal distribution of outcomes across generations. We further decompose overall mobility into structural and exchange components. We find that China exhibits more overall educational mobility than Russia mostly due to greater structural mobility, while Russia exhibits greater steady state educational mobility. In contrast, both the overall and steady state occupational mobility is similar in China and Russia. Comparing these results to the US, we find that steady state mobility in education is substantially higher in the US and Russia compared to China, but occupational steady state mobility is comparable in all three countries.
34124.zh_abstract: 本文考察了中国和俄罗斯在从中央计划经济向市场体系转型过程中的代际流动性。我们将流动性视为由父母与子女之间地位变化所捕捉的移动。我们提供了总体流动性的估计，这涉及向系统稳态转型过程中的流动性，以及稳态流动性，它捕捉了独立于转型动态或代际结果边际分布变化的长期流动性。我们进一步将总体流动性分解为结构性和交换性组成部分。我们发现，中国表现出比俄罗斯更高的总体教育流动性，这主要归因于更大的结构性流动性，而俄罗斯则表现出更高的稳态教育流动性。相比之下，中国和俄罗斯的总体和稳态职业流动性相似。将这些结果与美国进行比较，我们发现美国和俄罗斯的教育稳态流动性显著高于中国，但三个国家的职业稳态流动性相当。

34123.title: Military Spending and War
34123.abstract: We revisit the theory of critical deterrence—the idea that military spending may reduce the risk of conflict by increasing its expected costs. To test this theory, we assemble a new cross-national dataset combining information on armed conflicts and defense spending over a 75-year period. We find that increases in military spending have no effect on short-run conflict risk—contrary to concerns that buildups may provoke escalation—but that they do lead to a small and persistent decline in conflict over the long run. Although the effect of spending on conflict is modest, its effect on the cost of war is large: higher military spending raises the scale of battlefield casualties. The effect of military spending on conflict is more pronounced for democracies, which are less likely to use force offensively, and is concentrated in internal conflicts involving nonstate actors. The deterrent power of military spending is strongest in ethnically polarized societies—precisely where the threat of civil war is most acute. Last, using dyadic data, we find that higher military spending causes a decrease in bilateral interstate conflict, and that this effect may be larger than the one we document for intrastate conflict using panel data. Taken together, our results point to a low pass-through from the cost of war to its incidence: even sharp increases in military spending yield only modest gains in deterrence.
34123.zh_abstract: 我们重新审视了关键威慑理论——即军费开支可能通过增加冲突的预期成本来降低冲突风险的观点。为了检验这一理论，我们整理了一个新的跨国数据集，该数据集结合了75年期间关于武装冲突和国防开支的信息。我们发现，军费开支的增加对短期冲突风险没有影响——这与军备建设可能引发升级的担忧相反——但确实会导致长期冲突小幅且持续地下降。尽管军费开支对冲突的影响不大，但它对战争成本的影响却很大：更高的军费开支提高了战场伤亡的规模。军费开支对冲突的影响在民主国家更为显著，这些国家不太可能进攻性地使用武力，并且主要集中在涉及非国家行为体的内部冲突中。军费开支的威慑力在种族两极分化的社会中最为强大——而这正是内战威胁最为严峻的地方。最后，利用二元数据，我们发现更高的军费开支导致双边国家间冲突减少，并且这种影响可能大于我们使用面板数据记录的国内冲突的影响。综合来看，我们的结果指向战争成本向其发生率的低传导：即使军费开支大幅增加，也只能带来适度的威慑收益。

34122.title: Is This Really Kneaded? Identifying and Eliminating Potentially Harmful Forms of Workplace Control
34122.zh_title: 这真的需要揉捏吗？识别并消除潜在有害的工作场所控制形式
34122.authors: Guido Friebel, Matthias Heinz, Mitchell Hoffman, Tobias Kretschmer, Nick Zubanov
34122.abstract: In a large German bakery chain, many workers report negative perceptions of monitoring via checklists. We survey workers and managers about the value and time costs to all in-store checklists, leading the firm to randomly remove two of the most perceivedly time-consuming and low-value checklists in half of stores. Sales increase and store manager attrition substantially decreases, and this occurs without a rise in measurable workplace problems. Before random assignment, regional managers predict whether the treatment would be effective for each store they oversee. Ex post, beneficial effects of checklist removal are fully concentrated in stores where regional managers predict the treatment will be effective, reflecting substantial heterogeneity in returns that is well-understood by these upper managers. Effects of checklist removal do not appear to come from workers having more time for production, but rather coincide with improvements in employee trust and commitment. Following the RCT, the firm implemented firmwide reductions in monitoring, eliminating a checklist regarded as demeaning, but keeping a checklist that helps coordinate production.
34122.zh_abstract: 在一家大型德国面包连锁店中，许多员工对通过检查表进行监控持负面看法。我们调查了员工和管理层对所有店内检查表的价值和时间成本，促使该公司随机移除一半门店中两个被认为最耗时且价值最低的检查表。销售额增加，门店经理流失率大幅下降，且未出现可衡量的工作场所问题上升。在随机分配之前，区域经理预测了处理措施对其所辖每家门店是否有效。事后发现，移除检查表的有益效果完全集中在区域经理预测处理措施有效的门店，这反映了这些高层管理者充分理解的回报异质性。移除检查表的效果似乎并非源于员工有更多时间用于生产，而是与员工信任和承诺的改善相吻合。在随机对照试验之后，该公司在全公司范围内减少了监控，取消了一个被认为有辱人格的检查表，但保留了一个有助于协调生产的检查表。

34121.title: Unbalanced Financial Globalization
34121.abstract: We use a dynamic spatial general equilibrium model of international investment and production to investigate the real implications of the last five decades of financial globalization. We introduce a wedge accounting framework to estimate country- and time-varying measures of outward and inward Revealed Financial Openness (RFO). These wedges are meant to capture all impediments to cross-border investment, rather than explicit policy measures alone. We show how to identify these wedges for a large panel of countries using limited publicly available data on national accounts and external asset and liability positions since the 1970s. Our analysis reveals striking cross-country differences in the pace and direction of financial opening: wealthier countries have become relatively more open to foreign capital inflows, while poorer countries have become relatively more open to capital outflows, a phenomenon we call “Unbalanced Financial Globalization.” Counterfactual simulations show that this unbalanced financial globalization has worsened capital allocation, resulting in a 5.9% decrease inworld GDP, a 3.4% rise in cross-country income inequality, lower wages in poorer countries, and a decline in rates of return on capital in richer countries. In contrast, if financial integration had been uniform, the improved allocation of capital would have reduced income inequality, and increased global GDP. These findings underscore the crucial role of spatial heterogeneity in shaping the real impact of international capital markets integration.
34121.zh_abstract: 我们使用一个国际投资与生产的动态空间一般均衡模型，来研究过去五十年金融全球化的实际影响。我们引入了一个楔子核算框架，以估计各国随时间变化的对外和对内“显性金融开放度”指标。这些楔子旨在捕捉跨境投资的所有障碍，而不仅仅是明确的政策措施。我们展示了如何利用自1970年代以来有限的公开国民账户和外部资产与负债头寸数据，为大量国家识别这些楔子。我们的分析揭示了各国在金融开放速度和方向上的显著差异：较富裕国家对外资流入相对更加开放，而较贫穷国家则对资本流出相对更加开放，我们将这一现象称为“不平衡的金融全球化”。反事实模拟表明，这种不平衡的金融全球化恶化了资本配置，导致全球GDP下降5.9%，跨国收入不平等加剧3.4%，较贫穷国家工资降低，以及较富裕国家资本回报率下降。相比之下，如果金融一体化是均匀的，资本配置的改善将减少收入不平等并增加全球GDP。这些发现强调了空间异质性在塑造国际资本市场一体化实际影响中的关键作用。
34121.meta: Programs：EFG, IFM, ITI；JEL：F2, F3, F4, F6

34120.title: Climate Politics in the United States
34120.authors: Matilde Bombardini, Frederico Finan, Nicolas Longuet-Marx, Suresh Naidu, Francesco Trebbi
34120.abstract: We study the effects of climate change and mitigation-related employment changes on U.S. politics. We combine 2000-2020 precinct-level voting information and congressional candidate positions on environmental policy with high-resolution temperature, precipitation, and census block-group level measures of “green” and “brown” employment shares. Holding politician positions fixed within a district, we find that Democratic vote shares increase with exogenous changes in local climate and green transition employment. We embed these estimates into a model of political competition, including both direct and demand-driven effects of shocks on candidate supply of climate policy positions. Incorporating these estimates into 2022-2050 projections of climate change and green employment transition, we find that voting for the Democratic Party increases, while both parties move slightly to the right on climate policy. Under worst-case climate projections and current mitigation trajectories, our estimates indicate that the probability the House passes a carbon-pricing bill is 9 percentage points higher in 2050 than in 2020.
34120.zh_abstract: 我们研究了气候变化和与减排相关的就业变化对美国政治的影响。我们将2000-2020年选区级投票信息以及国会候选人在环境政策上的立场，与高分辨率的气温、降水数据以及人口普查区块组层面的“绿色”和“棕色”就业份额相结合。在保持选区内的政治家立场不变的情况下，我们发现，当地气候和绿色转型就业的外生变化会增加民主党得票率。我们将这些估计嵌入一个政治竞争模型，该模型同时考虑了冲击对候选人提供气候政策立场的直接效应和需求驱动效应。将这些估计纳入2022-2050年气候变化和绿色就业转型的预测中，我们发现对民主党的投票增加，而两党在气候政策上均略微右移。在最坏的气候预测和当前减排轨迹下，我们的估计表明，众议院通过碳定价法案的概率在2050年比2020年高出9个百分点。

34119.title: Why Does Value-Added Work? Implications of a Dynamic Model of Student Achievement
34119.zh_title: 为什么增值法有效？学生成绩动态模型的含义
34119.authors: Douglas O. Staiger, Thomas J. Kane, Brian D. Johnson
34119.abstract: Non-experimental value-added models have been shown to yield forecast-unbiased estimates of teacher and school effects. To investigate, we propose a dynamic state-space model of knowledge accumulation, in which test scores are imperfect measures of knowledge, and students receive temporary and persistent shocks to their stock of knowledge each period.
