The model identifies two primary sources of bias: transient factors in baseline scores (measurement error or transitory effects of prior teachers) and heterogeneous student growth rates. We propose diagnostic tests and corrections for each. Using eleven years of data from North Carolina, we find little evidence of heterogeneous student growth. Rather, the primary source of bias is attenuation of the baseline coefficient, which opens the door to selection on correlates of true baseline knowledge. Although conventional value-added estimates are biased for individual teachers due to attenuation, we find they are forecast unbiased when applied across a sample of teachers, due to the offsetting relationship between bias and teachers’ true effectiveness. When achievement follows the state-space model and there is no heterogeneity in growth rates, the attenuation-corrected value-added model (ACVAM) should yield unbiased estimates of a wide range educational interventions, not just teachers and schools.
34119.zh_abstract: 非实验性的增值模型已被证明能产生对教师和学校效应的预测无偏估计。为了探究其原因，我们提出了一个知识积累的动态状态空间模型，其中考试成绩是知识的不完美度量，学生每期都会受到对其知识存量的暂时性和持续性冲击。该模型识别出两个主要的偏差来源：基线分数中的暂时性因素（测量误差或先前教师的暂时性影响）以及异质性的学生成长率。我们针对每个来源提出了诊断性检验和修正方法。使用北卡罗来纳州十一年的数据，我们几乎没有发现异质性学生成长率的证据。相反，偏差的主要来源是基线系数的衰减，这为基于真实基线知识相关特征的选择打开了大门。尽管由于衰减，传统的增值估计对个别教师存在偏差，但我们发现，当应用于一个教师样本时，由于偏差与教师真实有效性之间的抵消关系，这些估计是预测无偏的。当成绩遵循状态空间模型且不存在成长率异质性时，衰减修正的增值模型应对广泛的教育干预措施（不仅仅是教师和学校）产生无偏估计。

34118.title: Creative Financing and Public Moral Hazard: Evidence from Medicaid and the Nursing Home Industry
34118.zh_title: 创造性融资与公共道德风险：来自医疗补助和养老院行业的证据
34118.authors: Martin B. Hackmann, Juan S. Rojas, Nicolas R. Ziebarth
34118.abstract: This paper studies the misallocation of Medicaid funds, its consequences for reimbursement rates, the quantity, and the quality of care provided. Combining two decades of administrative, audit, and survey data on U.S. nursing homes, we show that states employ creative financing schemes to divert federal matching funds from their intended purposes. Our theoretical and empirical analysis demonstrates that, to increase federal matching funds, such schemes distort the quality-quantity tradeoff. In Indiana, exploiting plausibly exogenous variation in the rollout of a creative financing scheme, we find a disproportionate expansion of Medicaid-funded care for dementia patients in the lowest-quality nursing facilities.
34118.zh_abstract: 本文研究了医疗补助资金的错配及其对报销率、护理数量和质量的影响。结合美国养老院二十年的行政、审计和调查数据，我们表明各州采用创造性融资方案，将联邦配套资金从其预期用途中转移。我们的理论和实证分析表明，为了增加联邦配套资金，此类方案扭曲了质量与数量之间的权衡。在印第安纳州，利用一个创造性融资方案推广过程中看似外生的变化，我们发现，在质量最低的养老机构中，针对痴呆症患者的医疗补助资助护理出现了不成比例的扩张。
34118.meta: Programs：AG, EH, PE, POL；JEL：H51, H75, I11, I13, I18, J14

34103.title: Engineering Ukraine's Wirtschaftswunder
34103.zh_title: 规划乌克兰的经济奇迹
34103.authors: Ufuk Akcigit, Furkan Kilic, Somik Lall, Solomiya Shpak
34103.abstract: As Ukraine emerges from the devastation of war, it faces a historic opportunity to engineer its own Wirtschaftswunder—a productivity-driven economic transformation akin to post-war West Germany. While investment-led growth may offer quick wins, it is efficiency, innovation, and institutional reform that will determine Ukraine’s long-term economic trajectory. Drawing on rich micro-level firm data spanning 25 years, this paper uncovers deep structural distortions that have suppressed creative destruction and productivity in Ukraine. It finds that business dynamism is on the decline, alongside rising market concentration among incumbent businesses, including low productivity state owned enterprises. To inform priorities for reviving business dynamism, this study develops a model of creative destruction drawing on Acemoglu et al. (2018) and Akcigit et al. (2021). The quantitative assessment highlights that policies that discipline entrenched incumbents are the bedrock for reviving business dynamism and engineer Ukraine’s Wirtschaftswunder. Policies targeting specific types of firms have limited efficacy when incumbents run wild.
34103.zh_abstract: 随着乌克兰从战争的破坏中复苏，它面临着一个历史性的机遇来规划自己的经济奇迹——一场类似于战后西德的生产力驱动的经济转型。虽然投资驱动的增长可能带来快速成效，但效率、创新和制度改革将决定乌克兰的长期经济轨迹。本文利用跨越25年的丰富微观企业数据，揭示了乌克兰内部抑制创造性破坏和生产力的深层结构性扭曲。研究发现，商业活力正在下降，同时现有企业（包括低生产率国有企业）的市场集中度在上升。为了为恢复商业活力的优先事项提供信息，本研究基于Acemoglu等人（2018）和Akcigit等人（2021）的模型，构建了一个创造性破坏模型。定量评估强调，约束根深蒂固的现有企业的政策是恢复商业活力和规划乌克兰经济奇迹的基石。当现有企业不受约束时，针对特定类型企业的政策效果有限。

34177.title: Reserves, Sanctions and Tariffs in a Time of Uncertainty
34177.zh_title: 不确定性时期的储备、制裁与关税
34177.authors: Menzie D. Chinn, Jeffrey A. Frankel, Hiro Ito
34177.abstract: We analyze the determinants of individual central bank holdings of international reserves, as shares of gold, dollar, euro, pound, yen and yuan, over the 1999-2022 period. We augment standard economic determinants of size, exchange rate volatility, currency pegs and bilateral trade with bilateral political/economic variables such as disagreement in UN voting, military alliances, and financial and trade sanctions. These variables augment uncertainty measures such as global Economic Policy Uncertainty, US monetary and trade policy uncertainty, and the VIX. In addition, we investigate whether the US imposition of tariffs in 2018 had any measurable impact on dollar and other holdings. We conclude that financial sanctions and trade policy uncertainty have a statistically and economically significant effect on holdings of the US dollar. US tariffs had an economically – but not statistically – significant impact on shares of foreign exchange reserves: dollar shares fell by 2.1% and other shares rose by 0.8%. These findings can inform the debate regarding some of the benefits and costs of using such geo-economic policies.
34177.zh_abstract: 我们分析了1999年至2022年期间各央行国际储备持有量（以黄金、美元、欧元、英镑、日元和人民币的份额计）的决定因素。我们在规模、汇率波动、货币挂钩和双边贸易等标准经济决定因素之外，增加了双边政治/经济变量，如联合国投票分歧、军事联盟以及金融和贸易制裁。这些变量增强了不确定性指标，如全球经济政策不确定性、美国货币和贸易政策不确定性以及VIX指数。此外，我们研究了美国2018年加征关税是否对美元及其他货币的持有量产生了可衡量的影响。我们得出结论：金融制裁和贸易政策不确定性对美元持有量具有统计上和经济上显著的影响。美国关税对外汇储备份额产生了经济上显著（但统计上不显著）的影响：美元份额下降了2.1%，其他货币份额上升了0.8%。这些发现可以为关于使用此类地缘经济政策的一些收益和成本的辩论提供信息。

34176.title: Aggregate Productivity with Heterogeneous Agents
34176.zh_title: 异质性主体下的总生产率
34176.abstract: We develop a welfare-based measure of aggregate productivity for economies with heterogeneous households. For any change in the economic environment, we define the associated change in aggregate productivity as the largest contraction in total factor-augmenting productivity that makes it feasible to leave every household at least as well off as under the status quo allocation. This construction maps arbitrary shocks to the economy into a TFP-equivalent change: aggregate productivity rises when the post-shock economy can make every household whole and still have resources left over, and falls when doing so requires additional resources. This measure provides a general-equilibrium analogue of cost-benefit analysis. Under standard representative-agent assumptions, it coincides with familiar measures such as real GDP, cost-benefit efficiency, and consumption-equivalent welfare. We show how to extend results that hold for welfare in representative-agent settings, including Hulten’s theorem, gains from trade formulas, and deadweight-loss triangles, to heterogeneous-agent economies. We characterize changes in aggregate productivity in terms of observables, including expenditures and price elasticities, and apply the measure to productivity shocks, misallocation, and trade shocks, both with and without costly redistribution.
34176.zh_abstract: 我们为具有异质性家庭的经济体开发了一种基于福利的总生产率衡量指标。对于经济环境的任何变化，我们将相关的总生产率变化定义为使每个家庭至少与现状分配下一样好成为可行所需的最大全要素增强型生产率收缩。这种构造将经济中的任意冲击映射为全要素生产率等价的变化：当冲击后的经济能够使每个家庭保持完整且仍有剩余资源时，总生产率上升；当这样做需要额外资源时，总生产率下降。这一衡量指标提供了成本效益分析的一般均衡类比。在标准代表性主体假设下，它与熟悉的指标如实际GDP、成本效益效率和消费等价福利相一致。我们展示了如何将代表性主体环境中适用于福利的结果（包括Hulten定理、贸易收益公式和无谓损失三角形）扩展到异质性主体经济体。我们根据可观测变量（包括支出和价格弹性）来刻画总生产率的变化，并将该衡量指标应用于生产率冲击、资源错配和贸易冲击，无论是否涉及代价高昂的再分配。
34176.meta: Programs：EFG, IFM, ITI, PR；JEL：A10, C0, D0, D3, D50, D60, E0, F0, H0

34175.title: Selection Bias and Racial Disparities in Police Use of Force
34175.zh_title: 选择偏差与警察使用武力中的种族差异
34175.authors: Felipe M. Gonçalves, Steven Mello, Emily K. Weisburst
34175.abstract: We study racial disparities in police use of force. A pervasive issue in studies of policing is that the available data are selected by the police. As a result, disparities computed in the observed sample may be biased if selection into the data differs by race. We develop a framework and econometric strategy for correcting this bias, using variation across officers in enforcement intensity to identify the racial composition of the unobserved population at risk of selection. Using detailed administrative data on arrests and force incidents from Chicago and Seattle, we find that Black civilians comprise 56 percent of arrestees but about 49 percent of potential arrestees. Correcting for sample selection doubles our measure of the racial disparity in force rates. Decompositions of the corrected force disparity reveal that about 70 percent is unexplained by other demographic and incident characteristics, suggesting an important role for officer discrimination. Our selection bias estimates meaningfully impact the conclusions drawn in the existing literature.
34175.zh_abstract: 我们研究警察使用武力中的种族差异。警务研究中的一个普遍问题是，可用数据是由警察选择的。因此，如果数据选择因种族而异，那么在观测样本中计算的差异可能存在偏差。我们开发了一个框架和计量经济学策略来纠正这种偏差，利用不同警官执法强度的差异来识别处于选择风险中的未观测人群的种族构成。利用来自芝加哥和西雅图的逮捕和武力事件的详细行政数据，我们发现黑人平民占逮捕人数的56%，但约占潜在逮捕人数的49%。纠正样本选择后，我们对武力使用率中种族差异的衡量指标翻了一番。对纠正后的武力差异的分解显示，约70%无法由其他人口统计特征和事件特征解释，这表明警官歧视起着重要作用。我们的选择偏差估计对现有文献中得出的结论产生了显著影响。
34175.meta: Programs：LE, LS, PE, POL；JEL：C10, J15, K42

34174.title: How Retrainable are AI-Exposed Workers?
34174.zh_title: 受人工智能影响的工人再培训能力有多强？
34174.authors: Benjamin G. Hyman, Benjamin Lahey, Karen Ni, Laura Pilossoph
34174.abstract: As artificial intelligence (AI) capabilities advance, will workers best adapt by reskilling into AI-complementary work or by sorting into occupations less exposed to AI? To answer this question, we assemble a new dataset of 1.9 million occupational training spells funded by the U.S. Workforce Innovation and Opportunity Act from 2012–2024. We link pre- and post-training occupations to task-level AI exposure measures and estimate returns to training by comparing trainees to matched workers who sought workforce services but received only job search assistance. While trainees from low AI-exposure occupations earned high quarterly returns throughout the sample period, returns for workers from high-exposure occupations rose sharply—from about $\$900$ quarterly before 2020 to $\$2,900$ by 2022–2024. We attribute these gains primarily to transitions into less AI-exposed occupations and, to a lesser extent, to the expansion of training programs that build AI-complementary skills. To quantify when training into higher AI exposure work pays off, we construct a new AI Retrainability Index (AIR) and find that a large share of occupations are “AI-retrainable,” pointing to broad potential for adaptation.
34174.zh_abstract: 随着人工智能能力的提升，工人最佳适应方式是重新学习技能进入与人工智能互补的工作，还是转向受人工智能影响较小的职业？为回答这个问题，我们整理了一个新的数据集，包含2012年至2024年间由美国《劳动力创新与机会法案》资助的190万次职业培训记录。我们将培训前后的职业与任务层面的人工智能暴露指标联系起来，并通过将受训者与寻求劳动力服务但仅获得求职帮助的匹配工人进行比较，来估计培训的回报。虽然来自低人工智能暴露职业的受训者在整个样本期间获得了高额的季度回报，但来自高暴露职业的工人的回报急剧上升——从2020年前的约900美元季度回报增至2022-2024年的2900美元。我们将这些收益主要归因于向人工智能暴露较低职业的转型，以及在较小程度上归因于培养人工智能互补技能的培训项目的扩展。为了量化何时培训进入更高人工智能暴露的工作是有回报的，我们构建了一个新的人工智能再培训指数，并发现很大一部分职业是“可人工智能再培训的”，这表明了广泛的适应潜力。

34173.title: Streaks to Success? The Effects of Highlighting Streaks on Student Effort and Learning
34173.zh_title: 连胜通向成功？突出连胜对学生努力和学习的影响
34173.authors: Raphaëlle Aulagnon, Julian Cristia, Santiago Cueto, Ofer Malamud
34173.abstract: We examine whether highlighting streaks—instances of repeated and consecutive behavior when completing learning tasks—encourages 4th to 6th grade students in Peru to increase their use of an online math platform and improve learning. 60,000 students were randomly assigned to receive messages that (i) highlighted streaks, (ii) provided personalized reminders with positive reinforcement, (iii) provided generic reminders, or (iv) to a control group. Highlighting streaks and providing personalized reminders significantly increased platform use compared to generic reminders and the control group, with streaks more effective on the intensive margin and personalized reminders more effective on the extensive margin. Highlighting streaks also significantly improved math achievement compared to the control group among the 1,500 students who took an endline test, although differences with other treatment arms were not significant.
34173.zh_abstract: 我们研究了在完成学习任务时突出连胜（重复和连续行为的实例）是否会鼓励秘鲁4至6年级学生增加对在线数学平台的使用并改善学习。60,000名学生被随机分配接收以下信息：(i) 突出连胜，(ii) 提供带有积极强化的个性化提醒，(iii) 提供通用提醒，或 (iv) 作为对照组。与通用提醒和对照组相比，突出连胜和提供个性化提醒显著增加了平台使用，其中连胜在集约边际上更有效，而个性化提醒在广延边际上更有效。在参加期末测试的1,500名学生中，与对照组相比，突出连胜也显著提高了数学成绩，尽管与其他处理组之间的差异不显著。

34172.title: Outsourcing, Labor Market Frictions, and Employment
34172.zh_title: 外包、劳动力市场摩擦与就业
34172.abstract: We estimate the labor market impacts of Brazil’s 1993 outsourcing legalization using North-South variation in pre-legalization court permissiveness, and comparing security guards to less-affected occupations. We find that outsourcing legalization persistently reallocated jobs from older incumbent guards to younger entrants. Total employment of guards and their entry from informality persistently increased, while average demographic-adjusted wages remained constant. Meanwhile, a wave of occupational layoffs displaced some incumbent guards from high-wage firms. The evidence suggests that the rise of non-core activity outsourcing reduced labor market frictions, facilitated by firm-level economies of scale in human resources and spillovers to non-adopting firms.
34172.zh_abstract: 我们利用巴西1993年外包合法化前后法院在南北地区宽容度的差异，并通过将保安与受影响较小的职业进行比较，来估计外包合法化对劳动力市场的影响。我们发现，外包合法化持续地将工作岗位从年长的在职保安重新分配给年轻的进入者。保安的总就业人数及其从非正规部门的进入人数持续增加，而经人口统计调整后的平均工资保持不变。与此同时，一波职业裁员使一些在职保安从高工资企业流失。证据表明，非核心活动外包的兴起减少了劳动力市场摩擦，这得益于企业层面人力资源的规模经济以及对未采用外包企业的溢出效应。
34172.meta: Programs：DEV, ITI, LS；JEL：J52, J58, L24, O17

34171.title: General Laws and the Emergence of Durable Political Parties: The Case of Pennsylvania
34171.zh_title: 一般法律与持久性政党的出现：宾夕法尼亚州的案例
34171.authors: Naomi R. Lamoreaux, John Joseph Wallis
34171.abstract: In previous work we have highlighted the importance of revisions to state constitutions that mandated that laws be general and uniform throughout the state. Indiana (in 1851) was the first state to adopt a general-law mandate, but most other states followed suit by the end of the century—most of them in the 1870s. This paper focuses on Pennsylvania, one of the states that made the change in the 1870s. We show that the movement to revise the state constitution was led by Republican party bosses seeking to suppress factional strife they thought was threatening their party’s dominance and perhaps even its existence. Their effort succeeded. We argue that it was the shift to general laws in Pennsylvania and other states that led to the emergence of a party system in the United States dominated by two durable political organizations.
34171.zh_abstract: 在之前的工作中，我们强调了州宪法修订的重要性，这些修订要求法律在全州范围内具有普遍性和统一性。印第安纳州（1851年）是第一个采用一般法律授权的州，但大多数其他州在世纪末之前也纷纷效仿——其中大部分是在1870年代。本文聚焦于宾夕法尼亚州，这是1870年代做出改变的州之一。我们表明，修订州宪法的运动是由共和党党魁领导的，他们试图压制他们认为威胁到其政党主导地位甚至生存的派系斗争。他们的努力成功了。我们认为，正是宾夕法尼亚州和其他州向一般法律的转变，导致了美国由两个持久的政治组织主导的政党体系的出现。
34171.meta: Programs：DAE, POL；JEL：N0, N4, N42, P0, P10

34170.title: How Much Tax Do US Billionaires Pay? Evidence from Administrative Data
34170.zh_title: 美国亿万富翁缴纳多少税？来自行政数据的证据
34170.authors: Akcan S. Balkir, Emmanuel Saez, Danny Yagan, Gabriel Zucman
34170.abstract: We estimate income and taxes for the wealthiest group of US households by matching Forbes 400 data to the individual, business, estate, and gift tax returns of the corresponding group in 2010–2020. In our benchmark estimate, the total effective tax rate—all taxes paid relative to economic income—of the top 0.0002% (approximately the “top 400”) averaged 24% in 2018–2020 compared with 30% for the full population and 45% for top labor income earners. This lower total effective tax rate on the wealthiest is substantially driven by low taxable individual income relative to economic income. First, the C-corporations owned by the wealthiest distributed relatively little in dividends, limiting their individual income tax unless they sell their stocks. Second, top-owned passthrough businesses reported negative taxable income on average in spite of positive book income, further limiting their individual income tax. The top-400 effective tax rate fell from 30% in 2010–2017 to 24% in 2018–2020, explained both by a smaller share of business income being taxed and by that income being subject to lower tax rates. Estate and gift taxes contributed relatively little to their effective tax rate. Top-400 decedents paid 0.8% of their wealth in estate tax when married and 7% when single. Annual charitable contributions equalled 0.6% of wealth and 11% of economic income in 2018–20.
34170.zh_abstract: 我们通过将福布斯400强数据与2010-2020年相应群体的个人、企业、遗产和赠与税申报表进行匹配，估算了美国最富裕家庭的收入和税收。在我们的基准估计中，最富有的0.0002%（大约“前400名”）的总有效税率——所有税收相对于经济收入的比率——在2018-2020年平均为24%，而全体人口为30%，最高劳动收入者为45%。最富裕群体较低的总有效税率主要源于其应税个人收入相对于经济收入较低。首先，最富裕群体拥有的C类公司分配的股息相对较少，除非他们出售股票，否则这限制了他们缴纳的个人所得税。其次，最富裕群体拥有的穿透型企业平均报告负的应税收入，尽管账面收入为正，这进一步限制了他们缴纳的个人所得税。前400名群体的有效税率从2010-2017年的30%下降到2018-2020年的24%，这既是因为被征税的企业收入份额变小，也是因为这些收入适用的税率更低。遗产税和赠与税对其有效税率的贡献相对较小。前400名群体中的已婚逝者缴纳的遗产税占其财富的0.8%，单身逝者则占7%。2018-2020年，年度慈善捐赠相当于财富的0.6%和经济收入的11%。

34169.title: Hopping on an Earlier Flight: Optimal Waiting with Multiple Flights
34169.zh_title: 跳上更早的航班：多航班情况下的最优等待
34169.abstract: When should travellers leave for the airport? This paper develops a model for optimal airport arrival timing when travellers face uncertain travel times and can potentially board earlier flights. We show that access to earlier flights creates a ``recourse option" that fundamentally changes optimal behaviour. While earlier flights always reduce the probability of missing one's scheduled departure, they may paradoxically increase expected waiting time when travellers adjust their arrival strategies. Using renewal theory, we establish that with frequent service, the expected waiting time converges to half the headway between flights—a fundamental limit that cannot be improved through better planning. We connect the problem to newsvendor theory, showing how the fixed penalty for missing flights (rather than linear costs) leads to distinct optimality conditions. Our results explain why rational travellers should occasionally miss flights and provide practical guidelines for airlines designing standby policies and for travellers making departure decisions.
34169.zh_abstract: 旅行者应该在什么时候出发去机场？本文构建了一个模型，用于在旅行者面临不确定的旅行时间且有可能登上更早航班时，确定最优的机场到达时间。我们表明，能够乘坐更早航班创造了一个“追索期权”，从根本上改变了最优行为。虽然更早的航班总是会降低错过预定航班的概率，但当旅行者调整其到达策略时，这可能会矛盾地增加预期等待时间。利用更新理论，我们证明，在航班服务频繁的情况下，预期等待时间收敛到航班间隔时间的一半——这是一个无法通过更好规划来改善的基本极限。我们将该问题与报童理论联系起来，展示了错过航班的固定惩罚（而非线性成本）如何导致不同的最优条件。我们的结果解释了为什么理性的旅行者有时应该错过航班，并为航空公司设计候补政策以及旅行者做出出发决策提供了实用指南。

34168.title: Clinician Behavior When Skin-Tone Affects Test Results
34168.zh_title: 肤色影响检测结果时的临床医生行为
34168.authors: Marcella Alsan, Liran Einav, Amy Finkelstein, Jonathan Zhang
34168.abstract: We compare care for Black versus white patients following pulse oximetry, a widely-used device for measuring blood oxygen levels which over-estimates oxygen saturation in darker-skinned patients. Black patients are therefore medically more appropriate for follow-up care than white patients with the same pulse oximetry reading. Yet, using data from the Veterans Health Administration on 3.5 million emergency department visits between 2014 and 2018, we find that Black patients systematically receive lower rates of follow-up care than white patients with the same reading. Our findings illustrate how bias in a medical screening device can be propagated and potentially amplified in downstream care.
34168.zh_abstract: 我们比较了脉搏血氧测定法后黑人与白人患者的护理情况。脉搏血氧测定法是一种广泛使用的测量血氧水平的设备，它会高估深肤色患者的血氧饱和度。因此，在脉搏血氧测定读数相同的情况下，黑人患者在医学上比白人患者更适合接受后续护理。然而，利用退伍军人健康管理局2014年至2018年间350万次急诊就诊的数据，我们发现，在读数相同的情况下，黑人患者接受后续护理的比例系统性低于白人患者。我们的研究结果说明了医疗筛查设备中的偏差如何在下游护理中被传播并可能被放大。
34168.meta: Programs：AG, CH, EH, LE, LS, PE；JEL：I11, I14, J14, J15

34167.title: Religion in Emerging and Developing Regions
34167.zh_title: 新兴及发展中地区的宗教
34167.authors: Sara Lowes, Benjamin Marx, Eduardo Montero
34167.abstract: This paper examines the evolving relationship between religion and economic development in emerging and developing countries (EDCs). Building on large-scale survey data and recent scholarship, we document persistent and, in many regions, increasing levels of religiosity. First, we present global trends in religious beliefs and practices, highlighting a religious divergence between EDCs and high-income countries, as well as the continued prevalence of traditional belief systems alongside major world religions. Second, we analyze the determinants and consequences of religious behavior, showing how income volatility, financial insecurity, and cultural transitions sustain demand for religion. Third, we explore the institutional and political dimensions of religion in EDCs, emphasizing the role of religious institutions as public goods providers and as politically influential actors. This discussion offers a framework for understanding religious organizations as adaptive, competing platforms in pluralistic religious marketplaces. Overall, our findings suggest that religious adaptation, rather than decline, is central to understanding the future of religion and its economic implications in the developing world.
34167.zh_abstract: 本文考察了新兴及发展中国家（EDCs）中宗教与经济发展之间不断演变的关系。基于大规模调查数据和近期学术研究，我们记录了这些地区持续且在许多情况下日益增长的宗教虔诚度。首先，我们展示了宗教信仰和实践的全球趋势，强调了新兴及发展中国家与高收入国家之间的宗教分化，以及传统信仰体系与主要世界宗教并存的持续现象。其次，我们分析了宗教行为的决定因素和后果，展示了收入波动、金融不安全和文化转型如何维持对宗教的需求。第三，我们探讨了新兴及发展中国家中宗教的制度与政治维度，强调了宗教机构作为公共物品提供者和具有政治影响力的行为者的角色。这一讨论为理解宗教组织在多元宗教市场中作为适应性、竞争性平台提供了一个框架。总体而言，我们的研究结果表明，宗教的适应而非衰落，是理解发展中世界宗教未来及其经济影响的核心。

34166.title: Practical Finance: An Approximate Solution to Lifecycle Portfolio Choice
34166.zh_title: 实用金融学：生命周期投资组合选择的近似解
34166.authors: James J. Choi, Canyao Liu, Pengcheng Liu
34166.abstract: Research on normative household financial choices almost always gives quantitative guidance in one of two forms: a simple formula for an unrealistic setting, or numerical solutions for only a few parameter sets in a realistic setting. We propose a middle-ground approach we call practical finance: analytic approximations to optimal solutions as a function of relevant parameters in realistic settings that are easily computed in a spreadsheet. We provide such an approximation for lifecycle portfolio choice with labor income. Across 5,103 parameter sets, our approximation results in welfare that is on average only 0.06% lower than that of the optimal solution.
34166.zh_abstract: 关于规范性家庭财务选择的研究几乎总是以两种形式之一给出定量指导：针对不现实情境的简单公式，或针对现实情境中仅少数参数集的数值解。我们提出了一种中间方法，称之为实用金融学：在现实情境中，作为相关参数函数的解析近似最优解，且易于在电子表格中计算。我们为具有劳动收入的生命周期投资组合选择提供了这样一个近似解。在5103个参数集中，我们的近似解产生的福利平均仅比最优解低0.06%。

34165.title: Robinson Meets Roy: Monopsony Power and Comparative Advantage
34165.zh_title: 罗宾逊遇见罗伊：买方垄断势力与比较优势
34165.authors: Mark Bils, Bariş Kaymak, Kai-Jie Wu
34165.abstract: We provide a number of insights into the nature and consequences of monopsony power through the lens of comparative advantage, where employers’ power in wage setting stems from match-specific rents. Chief among them is that employers will apply larger wage markdowns to workers with greater comparative advantage at their firm. This leads to stronger monopsony power over more productive workers, provided the workers’ comparative advantage aligns with their absolute advantage. Using Brazilian administrative data, we confirm this prediction: monopsony disproportionately affects high-wage workers within firms and workers at high-paying firms. The model, calibrated to our estimates for Brazil, predicts that minimum wages increase both wages and formal employment for more productive workers while pushing less productive workers out of formal employment.
34165.zh_abstract: 我们通过比较优势的视角，对买方垄断势力的性质和后果提供了一系列见解，其中雇主在工资设定中的权力源于匹配特定的租金。其中最主要的见解是，雇主将对在其公司具有更大比较优势的工人施加更大的工资折扣。这导致对生产率更高工人的买方垄断势力更强，前提是工人的比较优势与其绝对优势一致。利用巴西行政数据，我们证实了这一预测：买方垄断不成比例地影响公司内的高工资工人以及高工资公司的工人。该模型根据我们对巴西的估计进行了校准，预测最低工资会提高生产率更高工人的工资和正规就业，同时将生产率较低的工人挤出正规就业。

34164.title: College Application Mistakes and the Design of Information Policies at Scale
34164.zh_title: 大学申请错误与大规模信息政策的设计
34164.authors: Tomás Larroucau, Ignacio A. Rios, Anaïs Fabre, Christopher Neilson
34164.abstract: We examine whether large-scale information interventions can improve college application outcomes in a centralized admissions system. Using nationwide surveys from Chile, we document widespread information frictions and frequent application mistakes, such as omitting attainable preferred programs or failing to include safety options. To address these frictions, we partnered with the Ministry of Education to implement a large-scale field experiment that provided applicants with personalized information on admission probabilities and program characteristics through customized online platforms. The intervention increased the probability that previously unmatched students received an assignment by 44% and improved placement into higher-ranked programs by 20%. Building on these results, the policy was scaled nationwide, reaching all applicants. The scaled-up version, evaluated via an encouragement design, confirmed substantial gains, including higher admission rates for initially unmatched students and persistent enrollment improvements. Our findings show that low-cost, personalized information policies, when integrated into centralized admissions platforms, can substantially reduce application mistakes and improve student outcomes at scale. The results also highlight how leveraging existing market design infrastructure can enable scalable, cost-effective interventions that enhance efficiency and equity in higher education access.
34164.zh_abstract: 我们考察了大规模信息干预是否能在集中招生系统中改善大学申请结果。利用智利的全国性调查，我们记录了广泛的信息摩擦和频繁的申请错误，例如遗漏可达到的偏好项目或未能包含保底选项。为了解决这些摩擦，我们与教育部合作实施了一项大规模实地实验，通过定制的在线平台向申请者提供关于录取概率和项目特征的个性化信息。该干预措施使之前未被录取的学生获得录取分配的概率提高了44%，并使他们进入排名更高项目的比例提高了20%。基于这些结果，该政策被推广至全国，覆盖所有申请者。通过鼓励设计评估的扩大版本证实了显著的收益，包括最初未被录取学生的更高录取率和持续的入学改善。我们的研究结果表明，当与集中招生平台整合时，低成本的个性化信息政策可以大规模地大幅减少申请错误并改善学生结果。结果还强调了利用现有市场设计基础设施如何能够实现可扩展、成本效益高的干预措施，从而提高高等教育机会的效率和公平性。
34164.meta: Programs：ED, IO, LS, PE；JEL：C93, D47, D83, I0, I23, I28

34163.title: Model Uncertainty and Measures of Inequality of Opportunity
34163.zh_title: 模型不确定性与机会不平等度量
34163.authors: Giovanni Bernardo, Steven N. Durlauf, Andros Kourtellos, Chih Ming Tan
34163.abstract: Inequality of opportunity has great normative importance. This has led to a literature on measuring the part of overall inequality that is due to circumstances outside of a person’s control. We contribute to such studies by evaluating the implications of uncertainty about circumstance variables and linear versus nonlinear transmission of circumstances on inequality of opportunity estimates. Applying linear Bayesian model averaging methods and three ensemble tree-based machine learning approaches to data from 31 European Union countries, we find that ignoring model uncertainty can lead to substantial overstatement of levels of inequality of opportunity.
34163.zh_abstract: 机会不平等具有巨大的规范性重要性。这催生了一类文献，旨在衡量总体不平等中由个人无法控制的环境因素所导致的部分。我们通过评估环境变量的不确定性以及环境因素线性与非线性传递对机会不平等估计的影响，为这类研究做出了贡献。将线性贝叶斯模型平均方法和三种基于集成树的机器学习方法应用于31个欧盟国家的数据，我们发现忽略模型不确定性可能导致对机会不平等水平的显著高估。
34163.meta: Programs：ED, EFG, LS, PE；JEL：C10, C51, D30

34162.title: Corporate Hierarchy
34162.abstract: We introduce a novel measure of corporate hierarchies for over 3,100 U.S. public firms. This measure is obtained from online resumes of 7 million employees and a network estimation technique that allows us to identify hierarchical layers. Equipped with this measure, we document several facts about corporate hierarchies. Firms have on average ten hierarchical layers and a pyramidal organizational structure. More hierarchical firms have a more educated workforce, higher internal promotion rates, and longer employee tenure. Their operating performance is higher, but they face higher administrative costs. They are more active acquirers and produce more patents, but not higher-quality patents. They exhibit lower stock return volatility and operating asset volatility. We also examine how companies adjust their hierarchies in response to demand and knowledge shocks. We find that pharmaceutical companies increased their number of layers following the Covid-19 pandemic, while companies flattened their hierarchies following the adoption of artificial intelligence (AI) technologies. These findings are consistent with the theoretical predictions of existing models of corporate hierarchies.
34162.zh_abstract: 我们为超过3100家美国上市公司引入了一种新的企业层级结构度量方法。该度量基于700万员工的在线简历以及一种网络估计技术，使我们能够识别出层级结构。借助这一度量，我们记录了关于企业层级结构的若干事实。企业平均拥有十个层级，并呈现金字塔型组织结构。层级越多的企业，其员工受教育程度越高、内部晋升率越高、员工任职时间越长。这些企业的运营绩效更高，但行政成本也更高。它们更积极地收购其他公司，并产出更多专利，但专利质量并未更高。它们的股票回报波动率和运营资产波动率更低。我们还研究了企业如何根据需求冲击和知识冲击调整其层级结构。我们发现，制药公司在新冠疫情后增加了层级数量，而企业在采用人工智能技术后则减少了层级。这些发现与现有企业层级结构模型的理论预测一致。
34162.meta: Programs：CF；JEL：D21, D23, G3, J24, L22, M12, M51

34161.title: Misinformation and Mistrust: The Equilibrium Effects of Fake Reviews on Amazon.com
34161.zh_title: 虚假信息与不信任：虚假评论在亚马逊上的均衡效应
34161.authors: Ashvin Gandhi, Brett Hollenbeck, Zhijian Li
34161.abstract: Fake product reviews—and the manipulation of reputation systems by sellers more broadly—are a widespread issue for two-sided platforms. We study two primary channels through which such manipulation can affect market outcomes: (i) creating misinformation about the reviewed product, and (ii) breeding mistrust in ratings system overall. To examine these in the Amazon.com marketplace, we measure misinformation by observing products purchasing fake reviews and measure mistrust by eliciting shoppers’ beliefs about the prevalence of fake reviews on Amazon through an incentivized survey experiment. We incorporate these into a structural model of demand in which consumers form beliefs about product quality based on observed reviews and perceptions about their trustworthiness. Counterfactual policy simulations indicate that fake reviews reduce consumer welfare, shift sales from honest to dishonest sellers, and ultimately harm the platform. Welfare losses arise primarily from misinformation that leads to worse purchases. While mistrust also leads to purchasing mistakes, the consumer harms of mistrust are largely offset by increased price competition under a weakened ratings system. Finally, we identify key limitations in platforms’ incentives to police manipulation and evaluate enforcement alternatives.
34161.zh_abstract: 虚假产品评论——以及更广泛地，卖家对声誉系统的操纵——是双边平台面临的一个普遍问题。我们研究了这种操纵影响市场结果的两个主要渠道：(i) 制造关于被评论产品的虚假信息，以及 (ii) 在整体上滋生对评级系统的不信任。为了在亚马逊市场中考察这些渠道，我们通过观察购买虚假评论的产品来衡量虚假信息，并通过一项激励性调查实验来获取购物者对亚马逊上虚假评论普遍程度的信念，从而衡量不信任。我们将这些因素纳入一个结构性需求模型，在该模型中，消费者基于观察到的评论及其对评论可信度的感知来形成对产品质量的信念。反事实政策模拟表明，虚假评论降低了消费者福利，将销售从诚实卖家转移到不诚实卖家，并最终损害了平台。福利损失主要源于导致更差购买决策的虚假信息。虽然不信任也会导致购买错误，但在评级系统被削弱的情况下，不信任对消费者的损害在很大程度上被加剧的价格竞争所抵消。最后，我们指出了平台在监管操纵行为方面激励措施的关键局限性，并评估了替代执法方案。
34161.meta: Programs：IO, LE；JEL：L00, L1, L10, L11, L15, M3, M31, M38

34160.title: Scalable Expertise: How Standardization Drives Scale and Scope
34160.zh_title: 可扩展的专业知识：标准化如何驱动规模与范围
34160.authors: David Argente, Sara Moreira, Ezra Oberfield, Venky Venkateswaran
34160.abstract: We develop and test a theory of firm size and scope centered on standardization: the extent to which a firm’s products are similar. Heterogeneous firms choose the number, quality and standardization of their products. Standardizing makes expanding scope less costly, which then increases the return to standardization. Standardized firms have endogenously higher marginal returns to scale—their marginal costs rise less sharply with scale—implying greater responsiveness to demand shifts. We construct a novel measure of standardization using detailed product characteristics and show support for the theory’s main predictions. We show that new product features from standardized firms diffuse more quickly.
34160.zh_abstract: 我们提出并检验了一个以标准化为核心的企业规模与范围理论：标准化指的是企业产品之间的相似程度。异质性企业选择其产品的数量、质量和标准化程度。标准化使得扩大范围成本更低，进而提高了标准化的回报。标准化企业内在地具有更高的规模边际回报——其边际成本随规模扩大而上升得更慢——这意味着它们对需求变化的反应更灵敏。我们利用详细的产品特征构建了一个新颖的标准化度量，并验证了该理论的主要预测。我们发现，来自标准化企业的新产品特征传播得更快。

34159.title: Expecting Harm? The Impact of Rural Hospital Acquisitions on Maternal Health Care
34159.zh_title: 预期伤害？农村医院收购对孕产妇医疗的影响
34159.authors: David Dranove, Martin Gaynor, Eilidh Geddes
34159.abstract: While numerous papers document the effects of mergers on cost and quality, the effects of hospital mergers on access to care are less certain. Merging hospitals may limit access by closing one of the affected hospitals or eliminating individual service lines. However, hospital systems may have more resources to improve care delivery. We study the impact of hospital mergers on obstetric care in rural markets, where there may be heightened concern about the availability of local care options. Using a differences-in-differences approach, we find that when rural hospitals are acquired, there are substantial increases in the probability of obstetric unit closures, with resulting large reductions in the number of births at the hospital. We find mixed effects on health outcomes: there are small increases in maternal morbidity, but no changes in newborn outcomes on average. However, there are improvements of newborns with Medicaid coverage. Additionally, we find decreases in maternal transfers and increases in procedures consistent with women delivering in more resourced hospitals.
34159.zh_abstract: 尽管大量文献记录了并购对成本和质量的影响，但医院并购对医疗服务可及性的影响尚不确定。合并后的医院可能会通过关闭其中一家受影响医院或取消个别服务线来限制服务可及性。然而，医院系统可能拥有更多资源来改善医疗服务提供。我们研究了医院并购对农村市场产科护理的影响，在这些市场中，人们对当地护理选择的可用性可能更为担忧。使用双重差分方法，我们发现当农村医院被收购时，产科病房关闭的概率显著增加，导致医院分娩数量大幅减少。我们发现对健康结果的影响好坏参半：产妇发病率略有增加，但新生儿结局平均没有变化。然而，享受医疗补助计划的新生儿结局有所改善。此外，我们发现产妇转院减少，而与女性在资源更丰富的医院分娩相符的医疗程序有所增加。

34158.title: Which Individuals Create Jobs? Managerial Talent and Occupational Skills
34158.zh_title: 哪些人创造了就业？管理才能与职业技能
34158.authors: Marc-Andreas Muendler, James E. Rauch, Sergio Mikio Koyama
34158.abstract: We consider founders of limited liability firms who previously held jobs in the formal sector of Brazil. Managers are five percent of former job holders but their startups account for 27 percent of new firm employment. Relatively little of their overrepresentation as founders or the larger size of their startups is explained by their previous wages or other standard human capital variables. Among non-managerial former occupations we examined those clearly connected to demand (sales) and to supply (technology, purchasing). Only purchasing was comparable to managerial occupations in entrepreneurship and new firm size. Further examination suggests that a key to greater entrepreneurship and larger initial firm size is that workers’ former jobs entailed building relationships with other businesses: in demand-side occupations, they sold to other businesses; in supply-side occupations, they bought from other businesses.
34158.zh_abstract: 我们考察了有限责任公司的创始人，他们此前曾在巴西正规部门工作。管理人员仅占前职人员的5%，但他们的初创企业却贡献了27%的新企业就业。他们在创始人中的过度代表以及其初创企业规模较大，相对较少地由其之前的工资或其他标准人力资本变量所解释。在非管理类的前职业中，我们考察了那些明显与需求（销售）和供给（技术、采购）相关的职业。只有采购职业在创业率和初创企业规模方面与管理类职业相当。进一步的研究表明，工人之前的工作涉及与其他企业建立关系是促进更高创业率和更大初始企业规模的关键：在需求侧职业中，他们向其他企业销售；在供给侧职业中，他们从其他企业采购。

34157.title: Composition Beats Collapse: Insights from the Bisin–Verdier Model on Endogenous Fertility Reversal
34157.zh_title: 构成战胜崩溃：来自Bisin-Verdier模型关于内生生育率逆转的洞见
34157.abstract: Fertility rates have fallen below replacement in most countries, fueling predictions of demographic collapse. We show these forecasts overlook a crucial fact: societies are not homogeneous. Using the Bisin–Verdier model of cultural transmission with endogenous fertility and direct socialization, calibrated to U.S. and global data, we find that high-fertility, high-retention groups persist, gain share, and lead the total population to grow. Even if fertility remains below replacement in every country, extinction is unlikely. Simulations imply continued growth with pronounced compositional change, driven especially by religious communities with high fertility. In our ten-generation world calibration, Muslims become the largest tradition.
34157.zh_abstract: 大多数国家的生育率已降至更替水平以下，这助长了对人口崩溃的预测。我们表明这些预测忽略了一个关键事实：社会并非同质的。使用Bisin-Verdier文化传播模型，该模型包含内生生育率和直接社会化，并根据美国和全球数据进行校准，我们发现高生育率、高保留率的群体持续存在，份额增加，并导致总人口增长。即使每个国家的生育率都保持在更替水平以下，灭绝也不太可能发生。模拟结果表明，人口将持续增长，并伴随显著的人口构成变化，这尤其由高生育率的宗教社群所驱动。在我们十代人的全球校准中，穆斯林成为最大的传统群体。

34156.title: The Risk Protection Value of "Moral Hazard"
34156.zh_title: 道德风险的风险保护价值
34156.abstract: Health insurance lowers the out-of-pocket price of healthcare, and it is well-established that this leads to higher utilization of care. This type of “moral hazard” is typically viewed as a social cost of insurance. Within a standard model, we show that there are two important ways in which the consumer’s ability to change her behavior in response to insurance can play a central role in the ability of insurance to protect her from risk. These are (i) by allowing optimal exploitation of real income gained in bad states, and (ii) by enabling more resources to be shifted from good states to bad states than otherwise could be. We provide a theoretical characterization of these cases and quantify their importance empirically. Under standard parameterizations of demand for healthcare and health insurance, estimates in the literature imply that moral hazard accounts for as much as half of the total value of risk protection derived from insurance. Preventing consumers from changing their behavior in response to insurance would lower healthcare spending, but also result in a major loss of risk protection, on-net reducing social and consumer welfare in the population we study. Our results suggest that under-utilization of healthcare may thus be an equally important threat to welfare as over-utilization.
34156.zh_abstract: 健康保险降低了医疗服务的自付价格，并且众所周知这会导致医疗利用增加。这种“道德风险”通常被视为保险的社会成本。在一个标准模型中，我们表明消费者根据保险改变其行为的能力，在保险保护其免受风险的能力中，可以通过两种重要方式发挥核心作用。这两种方式是：(i) 允许在坏状态下最优地利用获得的实际收入，以及 (ii) 使得比原本可能的情况更多的资源能够从好状态转移到坏状态。我们提供了这些情况的理论刻画，并实证量化了它们的重要性。在医疗需求和健康保险的标准参数化下，文献中的估计表明，道德风险占保险提供的总风险保护价值的一半之多。阻止消费者根据保险改变其行为将降低医疗支出，但也会导致风险保护的重大损失，在我们研究的人群中净减少社会和消费者福利。我们的结果表明，医疗利用不足可能因此与过度利用一样，是对福利的重要威胁。

34155.title: onetary Economics at 30: A Reexamination of the Relevance of Money in Cashless Limiting Monetary Economies
34155.zh_title: 30岁时的货币经济学：对无现金极限货币经济中货币相关性的重新审视
34155.abstract: The well-known cashless-limiting result in Woodford (1998) has become the theoretical foundation for a large body of work that treats the costs and benefits of holding money as irrelevant for monetary transmission. I reexamine this result and find that it relies on a peculiar credit-market structure consisting of perfectly competitive, zero-interest deferred payment arrangements. I show that the result breaks down when the microstructure is generalized to allow for an endogenous interest rate and market power in credit intermediation. The tenuousness of this influential result should give pause to the widespread practice of basing monetary policy advice on models without money.
34155.zh_abstract: Woodford (1998) 中著名的无现金极限结果已成为大量研究的理论基础，这些研究将持有货币的成本和收益视为与货币传导无关。我重新审视了这一结果，并发现它依赖于一种由完全竞争、零利率的延期支付安排组成的特殊信贷市场结构。我表明，当微观结构被推广以允许内生利率和信贷中介中的市场势力时，该结果不再成立。这一有影响力的结果的脆弱性，应该让人们在广泛基于无货币模型提供货币政策建议的实践中三思而行。

34154.title: The Passthrough of Treasury Supply to Bank Deposit Funding
34154.zh_title: 国债供给对银行存款融资的传导效应
34154.authors: Wenhao Li, Yiming Ma, Yang Zhao
34154.abstract: We demonstrate the passthrough of Treasury supply to bank deposits through bank market power. We show that a larger Treasury supply crowds out deposits with disproportionate effects in more competitive deposit markets. A larger Treasury supply further curtails bank lending and affects bank funding structure. The explanatory power of Treasury supply is not driven by other shocks to deposit demand and supply. In comparison, monetary policy rate hikes have a larger impact on deposit funding in more concentrated markets, consistent with the deposits channel of monetary policy. Our empirical findings are rationalized in a model of imperfect deposit competition.
34154.zh_abstract: 我们通过银行市场势力论证了国债供给向银行存款的传导机制。研究表明，更大的国债供给会挤出存款，且在竞争更激烈的存款市场中影响更为显著。国债供给增加还会进一步抑制银行贷款并影响银行融资结构。国债供给的解释力并非由存款需求与供给的其他冲击所驱动。相比之下，货币政策加息在更集中的市场中对存款融资影响更大，这与货币政策的存款渠道一致。我们的实证发现通过一个不完全存款竞争模型得到了合理化解释。

34195.title: The Impact of Geopolitical Risk on Consumer Expectations and Spending
34195.zh_title: 地缘政治风险对消费者预期与支出的影响
34195.authors: Yuriy Gorodnichenko, Dimitris Georgarakos, Geoff Kenny, Olivier Coibion
34195.abstract: Using novel scenario-based survey questions that randomize the expected duration of the Russian invasion of Ukraine and Middle East conflict, we examine the causal impact of geopolitical risk on consumers’ beliefs about aggregate economic conditions and their own financial outlook. Expecting a longer conflict leads European households to anticipate a worsening of the aggregate economy, with higher inflation, lower economic growth, and lower stock prices. They also perceive negative fiscal implications, anticipating higher government debt and higher taxes. Ultimately, households view the geopolitical conflict as making them worse off financially and it leads them to reduce their consumption.
34195.zh_abstract: 利用新颖的基于情景的调查问题，随机设定俄罗斯入侵乌克兰和中东冲突的预期持续时间，我们考察了地缘政治风险对消费者关于总体经济状况及其自身财务前景信念的因果影响。预期冲突持续时间更长，会导致欧洲家庭预期总体经济恶化，表现为通胀上升、经济增长放缓和股价下跌。他们还感知到负面的财政影响，预期政府债务和税收将增加。最终，家庭认为地缘政治冲突使其财务状况恶化，并导致他们减少消费。

34194.title: Superstar Firms through the Generations
34194.zh_title: 跨越时代的超级明星企业
34194.authors: Yueran Ma, Benjamin Pugsley, Haomin Qin, Kaspar Zimmermann
34194.abstract: We present new facts about the largest American companies over the past century. In manufacturing, top firms in the 1910s, 1950s, and 2010s predominantly date back to around 1900. Even as this special generation persists, turnover among top firms has been substantial. In contrast, in retail and wholesale, we do not observe a special generation among top firms. We show in a model of firm dynamics that a special generation can arise from an industrial revolution, through the adoption of a scalable technology and learning-by-doing. Top firm turnover is matched by standard idiosyncratic productivity shocks. Time-varying market size growth rates or entry costs are not sufficient to explain the facts. Among retailers and wholesalers, learning appears absent, so a special generation would be harder to sustain. Our results highlight the potential for lasting nonstationarity among the dynamics of top firms, which can result from the long echoes of technological change.
34194.zh_abstract: 我们提出了关于过去一个世纪美国最大公司的新事实。在制造业中，1910年代、1950年代和2010年代的顶级公司主要可追溯至1900年左右。即使这一特殊世代持续存在，顶级公司之间的更替也相当显著。相比之下，在零售和批发业中，我们并未观察到顶级公司中存在特殊世代。我们在一个企业动态模型中表明，特殊世代可能源于一场工业革命，通过采用可扩展的技术和干中学而产生。顶级公司的更替可由标准的异质性生产率冲击来解释。随时间变化的市场规模增长率或进入成本不足以解释这些事实。在零售商和批发商中，学习效应似乎缺失，因此特殊世代更难维持。我们的结果凸显了顶级公司动态中可能存在的持久非平稳性，这可能是技术变革长期回响的结果。
34194.meta: Programs：CF, EFG, IO, PR；JEL：D2, E2, L1, M1

34193.title: Overlapping Generations Models, Multiplicity of Steady States and Momentary Equilibria, and Economic Fluctuations
34193.zh_title: 世代交叠模型、稳态与瞬时均衡的多重性以及经济波动
34193.abstract: This paper examines the simplest OLG models with capital accumulation, demonstrating three results that stand in marked contrast to those of the standard model: first, the possibility of multiple steady states; second, the possibility of multiple momentary equilibria under rational expectations; third, one of implications of multiple momentary equilibria is that dynamics may be marked by complex fluctuations (lacking even periodicity), but still within well-defined bounds. We provide quite general conditions (with general utility and production functions) under which in the simplest of OLG models, there can be multiple steady states, multiple momentary equilibria, and complex dynamics. Furthermore, we present a simple illustration of wobbly growth by incorporating credit friction.
34193.zh_abstract: 本文考察了最简单的具有资本积累的世代交叠模型，展示了与标准模型形成鲜明对比的三个结果：第一，存在多重稳态的可能性；第二，在理性预期下存在多重瞬时均衡的可能性；第三，多重瞬时均衡的一个含义是，动态过程可能以复杂波动（甚至缺乏周期性）为特征，但仍处于明确界定的界限内。我们提供了相当一般的条件（使用一般效用和生产函数），在此条件下，最简单的世代交叠模型中可能存在多重稳态、多重瞬时均衡和复杂动态。此外，我们通过引入信贷摩擦，提供了一个关于摇摆增长的简单例证。

34191.title: Navigating Medicaid: Experimental Evidence on Administrative Burden and Coverage Loss
34191.zh_title: 导航医疗补助：关于行政负担与保障覆盖损失的实验证据
34191.authors: Rebecca Mary Myerson, Allison Espeseth, Laura Dague
34191.abstract: We study how administrative burden can affect access to safety-net health insurance in a large-scale field experiment of outreach to Medicaid enrollees with an imminent renewal deadline. A pre-recorded call offering assistance increased Medicaid renewal by 1 percentage point (1.5%), including significant effects among tribal members, children, lower-income people, and people with chronic disease. Impacts were larger (21 percentage points) for people who sought assistance. Assuming the intervention could not affect underlying Medicaid eligibility, Medicaid-eligible people account for the findings. These data suggest administrative burden can cause people who are Medicaid eligible and need health care to lose their coverage.
34191.zh_abstract: 我们在一项大规模实地实验中研究了行政负担如何影响获得安全网健康保险的机会，该实验针对面临即将到来的续保截止日期的医疗补助参保者进行外展服务。一段提供帮助的预录电话使医疗补助续保率提高了1个百分点（1.5%），对部落成员、儿童、低收入人群和慢性病患者产生了显著影响。对于寻求帮助的人群，影响更大（21个百分点）。假设干预措施不能影响潜在的医疗补助资格，那么符合医疗补助资格的人群解释了这些发现。这些数据表明，行政负担可能导致符合医疗补助资格且需要医疗保健的人失去其保险覆盖。
34191.meta: Programs：AG, CH, EH, PE；JEL：C93, D73, H75, I13, I38

34190.title: Good Rents versus Bad Rents: R&D Misallocation and Growth
34190.zh_title: 好租金与坏租金：研发错配与增长
34190.authors: Philippe Aghion, Antonin Bergeaud, Timo Boppart, Peter J. Klenow, Huiyu Li
34190.abstract: Firm price-cost markups may reflect (a) bigger step sizes from quality innovations that confer significant knowledge spillovers onto other firms, and/or (b) higher process efficiency than competing firms or other factors which bear no obvious knowledge externality. We write down an endogenous growth model with innovation step size and process efficiency as alternative sources of markup heterogeneity. Compared with the laissez-faire equilibrium, the social planner wants to reallocate research towards high step size firms but not high process efficiency firms. We then use price and productivity data across firms in French manufacturing to infer firm step sizes and process efficiency. We find that the planner could achieve faster growth by reallocating research toward high step size firms, and more so if high step size firms could freely license their innovations to high process efficiency firms.
34190.zh_abstract: 企业的价格-成本加成可能反映：(a) 质量创新带来的更大步长，这些创新为其他企业提供了显著的知识溢出，和/或 (b) 比竞争对手更高的流程效率或其他不带有明显知识外部性的因素。我们构建了一个内生增长模型，将创新步长和流程效率作为加成率异质性的替代来源。与自由放任均衡相比，社会计划者希望将研究重新分配给高步长企业，而不是高流程效率企业。然后，我们利用法国制造业企业的价格和生产率数据来推断企业的步长和流程效率。我们发现，计划者可以通过将研究重新分配给高步长企业来实现更快的增长，如果高步长企业能够将其创新自由许可给高流程效率企业，则效果更佳。

34189.title: The Future of Foreign Trade
34189.abstract: Foreign trade has significantly contributed to global improvements in living standards, a reduction in global inequality since the mid-1990s, and the lifting of millions out of extreme poverty. These gains were supported by the rules-based international order established after World War II. However, these achievements are now under threat. Escalating trade wars risk not only causing significant economic harm to both the United States and low-income countries, but also exacerbating geopolitical tensions.
34189.zh_abstract: 对外贸易极大地促进了全球生活水平的提高，自20世纪90年代中期以来减少了全球不平等，并使数百万人摆脱了极端贫困。这些成果得到了二战后建立的基于规则的国际秩序的支持。然而，这些成就如今正受到威胁。不断升级的贸易战不仅有可能对美国自身和低收入国家造成重大经济损失，还可能加剧地缘政治紧张局势。

34188.title: Minimum Wages and the Distribution of Firm Wage Premia
34188.zh_title: 最低工资与企业工资溢价分布
34188.authors: Marcelo L. Bergolo, Rodrigo Ceni, Mathias Fondo, Damián Vergara
34188.abstract: This paper leverages a large minimum wage reform in Uruguay to study the effects of minimum wages on the distribution of firm wage premia. The reform significantly decreased wage inequality, mainly by reducing between-firm inequality. AKM and time-varying AKM analyses reveal a large compression in the distribution of firm fixed effects after the reform, driven by an increase in the fixed effects of low-premium firms. Firm-level and worker-level difference-in-differences analyses document a causal effect of the reform on the compression of firm fixed effects. Results suggest minimum wages can increase the supply of “good jobs” by “making bad jobs better”.
34188.zh_abstract: 本文利用乌拉圭一次大规模的最低工资改革，研究最低工资对企业工资溢价分布的影响。该改革显著降低了工资不平等，主要是通过减少企业间不平等实现的。AKM和时变AKM分析显示，改革后企业固定效应的分布出现了大幅压缩，这是由低溢价企业固定效应的上升所驱动的。企业层面和工人层面的双重差分分析记录了改革对企业固定效应压缩的因果效应。结果表明，最低工资可以通过“让坏工作变好”来增加“好工作”的供给。

34187.title: Endogenous Firm Ownership in General Equilibrium
34187.zh_title: 一般均衡中的内生企业所有权
34187.abstract: This paper examines firm ownership structures in competitive general equilibrium by introducing a model where ownership emerges endogenously rather than being assumed. By embedding the property rights theory of the firm into general equilibrium analysis, the model demonstrates how market forces determine both initial firm formation by entrepreneurs and subsequent trading of ownership rights. The key finding is that, in equilibrium, firms are created by managers who have long-term importance to performance, but these founder-managers nonetheless sell ownership to outside investors. This pattern emerges because managers can capture value through both the sale price and their ongoing employment relationship, while outside owners can only benefit through ownership. The model thus provides a novel theoretical foundation for observed patterns of entrepreneurial exit. Additionally, it identifies a distinct economic definition of an entrepreneur as an agent whose human capital is valuable for firms even when they do not remain long-term owners. The framework generates insights into firm formation, ownership dynamics, and the nature of entrepreneurship while maintaining the core structure of competitive general equilibrium analysis.
34187.zh_abstract: 本文通过引入一个所有权内生出现而非假设的模型，考察了竞争性一般均衡中的企业所有权结构。通过将企业的产权理论嵌入一般均衡分析，该模型展示了市场力量如何决定企业家初始创立企业以及随后所有权权利的交易。关键发现是，在均衡中，企业由对绩效具有长期重要性的管理者创立，但这些创始人-管理者仍然将所有权出售给外部投资者。这种模式的出现是因为管理者可以通过出售价格和持续的雇佣关系来获取价值，而外部所有者只能通过所有权获益。因此，该模型为观察到的企业家退出模式提供了新颖的理论基础。此外，它识别出一个独特的经济学意义上的企业家定义，即其人力资本即使在他们不长期持有所有权时对企业也有价值的代理人。该框架在保持竞争性一般均衡分析核心结构的同时，对企业形成、所有权动态和企业家精神的本质产生了深刻见解。

34186.title: Union Bargaining Power and the Amenity-Wage Tradeoff
34186.zh_title: 工会谈判力量与福利-工资权衡
34186.abstract: This paper studies how collective bargaining affects both wages and amenities. By merging collective bargaining agreements (CBAs) to linked employer-employee data in Brazil, I combine rich contracted amenities with wage information. I implement a difference-in-difference strategy that exploits a court ruling enforcing CBA continuation (i.e., ultractivity) to estimate the effects of union bargaining power. Strengthening unions raises wages and amenities without reducing employment—increasing retention despite some labor-labor substitution. A revealed preference approach shows that amenities account for 45% of total compensation gains. These findings suggest that collective bargaining can offset monopsony power, but employers retain the right-to-manage workforce composition.
34186.zh_abstract: 本文研究集体谈判如何同时影响工资和福利。通过将集体谈判协议与巴西的关联雇主-雇员数据合并，我将丰富的合同约定福利与工资信息相结合。我采用了一项双重差分策略，利用一项强制延续集体谈判协议（即超期效力）的法院裁决来估计工会谈判力量的影响。加强工会力量会在不减少就业的情况下提高工资和福利——尽管存在一定的劳动力替代效应，但提高了员工留任率。一项显示性偏好方法表明，福利占总薪酬增长的45%。这些发现表明，集体谈判可以抵消买方垄断力量，但雇主保留了管理劳动力构成的权利。

34185.title: The Medium Matters: Medical Decision-Making in Telemedicine versus In-person Care
34185.zh_title: 媒介至关重要：远程医疗与面对面诊疗中的医疗决策
34185.authors: Alexandra Steiny Wellsjo, Paul Gertler, Ada Kwan, Eric Remera, Piero Irakiza, Jeanine Condo, James Humuza
34185.abstract: The use of telemedicine has been on the rise. Although telemedicine has increased access to health care, little is known about how the medium changes providers’ medical decision-making. To evaluate how telemedicine differs from in-person care, we compare the quality and cost of in-person clinic visits and virtual visits over the phone for common conditions in Rwanda. To control for patient selection, we conduct an audit study with 2,532 standardized patient visits, where individuals portraying real patients presented standardized cases for malaria and upper respiratory infection (URI). We find that the quality of virtual care is higher than that of in-person care for URI and equally as good for malaria. Telemedicine providers also asked more questions about symptoms and medical history and prescribed more optional medicines for symptom management than in-person providers. We further find that telemedicine is more efficient than in-person care: virtual consultations were faster, had shorter wait times, resulted in fewer unnecessary medications and tests, and cost less for patients. Controlling for a rich set of provider characteristics, we show that provider selection does not appear to drive the results. Instead, better provider-patient communication over the phone emerges as a key mechanism. Providers report that it is easier to treat, get information from, and relate to patients over the phone. Providers also report feeling less social pressure during phone consultations. Consistent with survey evidence, we find that providers prescribe unnecessary antibiotics when asked by patients face-to-face, but not over the phone.
34185.zh_abstract: 远程医疗的使用一直在增加。尽管远程医疗增加了医疗服务的可及性，但关于媒介如何改变提供者的医疗决策，我们知之甚少。为了评估远程医疗与面对面诊疗的差异，我们比较了在卢旺达针对常见疾病的面对面诊所就诊和电话虚拟就诊的质量和成本。为了控制患者选择，我们进行了一项包含2532次标准化患者就诊的审计研究，其中扮演真实患者的个体针对疟疾和上呼吸道感染呈现了标准化病例。我们发现，对于上呼吸道感染，虚拟医疗的质量高于面对面诊疗，而对于疟疾，两者质量相当。远程医疗提供者比面对面提供者询问了更多关于症状和病史的问题，并为症状管理开具了更多可选药物。我们进一步发现，远程医疗比面对面诊疗更高效：虚拟咨询速度更快，等待时间更短，导致更少的不必要药物和检查，并且患者花费更少。在控制了一组丰富的提供者特征后，我们表明提供者选择似乎并非驱动结果的原因。相反，更好的提供者-患者电话沟通成为一个关键机制。提供者报告称，通过电话更容易治疗、获取信息以及与患者建立联系。提供者还报告称，在电话咨询中感受到的社会压力较小。与调查证据一致，我们发现，当患者当面要求时，提供者会开具不必要的抗生素，但在电话中则不会。
34185.meta: Programs：DEV, EH, LS, PR；JEL：I1, M50, O3

34184.title: Equality Before the Law in U.S. Civil War Courts-Martial
34184.zh_title: 美国内战军事法庭中的法律面前人人平等
34184.abstract: We examine disparities in acquittal rates and sentencing for Black and White soldiers in the US Civil War using all general courts-martial. We find that Blacks were disproportionately punished for group actions like mutiny and for violent crimes involving group violence, suggesting fears of large-scale rebellion influenced justice. However, we also uncover a system that was fair relative to many modern criminal courts in acquittals and in death sentences. The needs of the Army pushed towards fairness.
34184.zh_abstract: 我们利用所有一般军事法庭的记录，研究了美国内战中黑人士兵和白人士兵在无罪判决率和量刑方面的差异。我们发现，黑人因集体行动（如兵变）和涉及群体暴力的暴力犯罪而受到不成比例的惩罚，这表明对大规模叛乱的恐惧影响了司法。然而，我们也发现了一个相对于许多现代刑事法庭在无罪判决和死刑判决方面更为公平的制度。军队的需求推动了公平性。

34183.title: Productivity and Wedges: Economic Convergence and the Real Exchange Rate
34183.zh_title: 生产率与楔子：经济趋同与实际汇率
34183.authors: Michael B. Devereux, Ippei Fujiwara, Camilo Granados
34183.abstract: This paper explores the relationship between economic growth and the real exchange rate, specifically focusing on the convergence in price levels in Eastern European countries. While these countries have had significant convergence in GDP per capita (relative to the EU average) since the 1990s, convergence in real exchange rates for these countries stalled after the EU crisis. Using a standard theoretical framework, we estimate the main drivers of real exchange rates and show that a combination of productivity growth (Balassa-Samuelson effects) and labor market distortions help explain real exchange rate trends. We develop a structural two-country model that provides a rich decomposition of the long run determinants of the real exchange rate. Simulations based on observed sectoral productivities and labor market wedges show that the model can accurately account for the historical path of Eastern European real exchange rates, both before and after the EU crisis.
34183.zh_abstract: 本文探讨了经济增长与实际汇率之间的关系，特别关注东欧国家价格水平的趋同。尽管自1990年代以来，这些国家的人均GDP（相对于欧盟平均水平）已显著趋同，但它们的实际汇率趋同在欧盟危机后停滞不前。利用一个标准理论框架，我们估计了实际汇率的主要驱动因素，并表明生产率增长（巴拉萨-萨缪尔森效应）和劳动力市场扭曲的结合有助于解释实际汇率趋势。我们开发了一个结构性两国模型，该模型对实际汇率的长期决定因素进行了丰富的分解。基于观察到的部门生产率和劳动力市场楔子的模拟表明，该模型能够准确解释东欧实际汇率在欧盟危机前后的历史路径。

34182.title: Local Problems, Local Solutions: Evidence from the Drug-Free Communities Program on Youth Development
34182.zh_title: 地方问题，地方解决方案：来自无毒社区计划对青少年发展的证据
34182.authors: Shijun You, Wei Fu, Shin-Yi Chou
34182.abstract: The Drug-Free Communities (DFC) Support Program aims to reduce youth substance use by fostering multi-sector collaboration and implementing locally tailored strategies within the community. This study is among the first to evaluate the program’s impact on youth development outcomes in the United States. Using the Callaway and Sant’Anna (2021) difference-in-differences (CSDID) estimator, we find that the DFC program significantly reduces drug-related juvenile crime and improves academic performance. The effects are particularly pronounced in communities where coalitions include government agencies, highlighting the critical role of institutional coordination in mobilizing local resources. We also explore behavioral mechanisms, documenting reductions in marijuana use and opioid-related inpatient hospitalizations. A cost-benefit analysis indicates substantial welfare gains, suggesting that early-life prevention represents a cost-effective investment in public health.
34182.zh_abstract: 无毒社区支持计划旨在通过促进社区内的多部门合作和实施因地制宜的策略来减少青少年物质使用。本研究是首批评估该计划对美国青少年发展结果影响的研究之一。使用Callaway和Sant'Anna（2021）的双重差分估计量，我们发现无毒社区计划显著减少了与毒品相关的青少年犯罪，并提高了学业成绩。在联盟包括政府机构的社区中，这种效应尤为显著，凸显了机构协调在调动地方资源中的关键作用。我们还探讨了行为机制，记录了大麻使用和与阿片类药物相关的住院人数的减少。一项成本效益分析表明，该计划带来了显著的福利收益，表明早期预防是对公共卫生的一项具有成本效益的投资。
34182.meta: Programs：CH, EH；JEL：I12, I18, I20, I31, J13, K42

34181.title: Openness and Growth: A Comparison of the Experiences of China and Mexico
34181.zh_title: 开放与增长：中国和墨西哥经验的比较
34181.abstract: In the late 1980s, Mexico opened itself to international trade and foreign investment, followed in the early 1990s by China. China and Mexico are still the two countries characterized as middle-income by the World Bank with the highest levels of merchandise exports. Although their measures of openness have been comparable, these two countries have had sharply different economic performances: China has achieved spectacular growth, whereas Mexico’s growth has been disappointingly modest. In this article, we extend the analysis of Kehoe and Ruhl (2010) to account for the differences in these experiences. We show that China opened its economy while it was still achieving rapid growth from shifting employment out of agriculture and into manufacturing while Mexico opened long after its comparable phase of structural transformation. China is only now catching up with Mexico in terms of GDP per working-age person, and it still lags behind in terms of the fraction of its population engaged in agriculture. Furthermore, we argue that China has been able to move up a ladder of quality and technological sophistication in the composition of its exports and production, while Mexico seems to be stuck exporting a fixed set of products to its North American neighbors.
34181.zh_abstract: 在1980年代末，墨西哥向国际贸易和外国投资开放，随后在1990年代初，中国也采取了类似举措。中国和墨西哥至今仍是世界银行归类为中等收入国家中商品出口水平最高的两个国家。尽管它们的开放程度指标相当，但这两个国家的经济表现却截然不同：中国实现了惊人的增长，而墨西哥的增长则令人失望地温和。在本文中，我们扩展了Kehoe和Ruhl（2010）的分析，以解释这些经验的差异。我们表明，中国在开放经济时，仍通过将就业从农业转移到制造业实现快速增长，而墨西哥则在结构性转型的可比阶段过去很久之后才开放。中国现在才在人均劳动年龄人口GDP方面赶上墨西哥，并且在从事农业的人口比例方面仍然落后。此外，我们认为，中国已经能够在其出口和生产的构成中沿着质量和技术复杂性的阶梯向上移动，而墨西哥似乎停滞在向北美邻国出口固定产品组合的状态。
34181.meta: Programs：EFG, IFM, ITI；JEL：F43, O32, O47, O57

34180.title: Labor and Product Market Power, Endogenous Quality, and the Consolidation of the US Hospital Industry
34180.zh_title: 劳动力与产品市场势力、内生质量与美国医院行业的整合
34180.abstract: Existing structural analyses of the harmful effects of market consolidation focus on either product or labor markets in isolation, ignoring that product market competitors often compete for workers as well. This paper develops a unified framework for merger evaluation, finding that firms’ simultaneous exercise of oligopoly power in the product market and oligopsony power in the labor market amplifies the harm from mergers to both consumers and workers. The model also demonstrates how merger-induced gains in labor market power incentivize firms to reduce product quality, highlighting an additional channel for consumer harm. The model’s predictions are tested and quantified in the context of the recent consolidation of the US hospital industry. Linking panel data from several sources on all US hospitals from 1996-2022, a difference-in-differences design is estimated for nearly 150 high-concentration within-market mergers. Hospital mergers significantly reduce patient volume, increase prices, reduce employment, lower wages, and deteriorate quality of care, resulting in higher patient mortality. After recovering the structural parameters, the estimated model replicates observed merger impacts. Counterfactual exercises reveal that ignoring increased labor (product) concentration would lead one to under-predict the harm of mergers to consumers (workers).
34180.zh_abstract: 现有关于市场整合有害影响的结构性分析要么只关注产品市场，要么只关注劳动力市场，忽略了产品市场的竞争者往往也争夺工人这一事实。本文为合并评估开发了一个统一框架，发现企业在产品市场同时行使寡头垄断势力以及在劳动力市场行使寡头买方垄断势力，会放大合并对消费者和工人造成的损害。该模型还展示了合并带来的劳动力市场势力收益如何激励企业降低产品质量，突显了消费者受损的另一个渠道。该模型的预测在美国医院行业近期整合的背景下进行了检验和量化。通过链接1996-2022年所有美国医院的多个来源的面板数据，对近150个高集中度市场内合并估计了一个双重差分设计。医院合并显著减少了患者数量，提高了价格，减少了就业，降低了工资，并恶化了护理质量，导致患者死亡率上升。在恢复结构参数后，估计的模型复制了观察到的合并影响。反事实分析表明，忽略劳动力（产品）集中度的增加会导致低估合并对消费者（工人）的损害。
34180.meta: Programs：EH, IO, LE, LS；JEL：I11, J42, L41

34179.title: The Effects of Parental Income and Family Structure on Intergenerational Mobility: A Trajectories-Based Approach
34179.zh_title: 父母收入与家庭结构对代际流动性的影响：一种基于轨迹的方法
34179.authors: Yoosoon Chang, Steven N. Durlauf, Bo Hu, Joon Park
34179.abstract: We examine how parental income and family structure during childhood and adolescence affect adult income, emphasizing the timing of these effects. Using an ordered multinomial probability model with functional covariates, we find that these familial influences are strongest in middle childhood and adolescence. We also uncover a complementary relationship in the effects of income and family structure trajectories during key developmental periods. By flexibly controlling for personal and family characteristics using nonparametric methods, our approach effectively handles high-dimensional covariates. The results advance the understanding of intergenerational income mobility and highlight the long-term importance of familial conditions for adult economic success.
34179.zh_abstract: 我们研究了童年和青少年时期的父母收入与家庭结构如何影响成年收入，并强调了这些影响的时间点。使用一个带有函数协变量的有序多项概率模型，我们发现这些家庭影响在童年中期和青少年时期最为强烈。我们还发现了在关键发育时期，收入和家庭结构轨迹影响的互补关系。通过使用非参数方法灵活控制个人和家庭特征，我们的方法有效处理了高维协变量。这些结果推进了对代际收入流动性的理解，并突显了家庭条件对成年经济成功的长期重要性。
34179.meta: Programs：ED, EFG, LS, PE, TWP；JEL：C10, C14, C25, C50, D10, H0, J01, J10

34178.title: Serial Acquisitions in Tech
34178.authors: Ginger Zhe Jin, Mario Leccese, Liad Wagman, Yunfei Wang
34178.abstract: We document novel empirical patterns in technology-sector serial acquisitions from 2010 to 2023. Using a granular S&P taxonomy, we show that serial acquisitions—sequences of transactions by the same acquirer within the same or adjacent market categories—constitute approximately one-quarter to one-third of majority-control mergers and acquisitions. Follow on targets tend to be larger and older than initial targets, and publicly-traded non-private equity acquirers account for over half of these transactions, challenging the prevailing view that serial acquisitions primarily represent small-scale private equity roll-ups. We further examine a cumulative screening framework wherein regulatory review is triggered by the aggregate value of sequential transactions rather than individual deal thresholds. This approach typically maintains existing review timing or advances it moderately, though in extended acquisition series it can accelerate scrutiny by several transactions or multiple years. For GAFAM (Google/Alphabet, Apple, Facebook/Meta, Amazon, and Microsoft) and other top technology acquirers, the cumulative approach primarily expands coverage to transactions below traditional thresholds and those with incomplete valuation data, rather than accelerating reviews of already-reportable acquisitions. An algorithmic screening tool implementing such a framework could enable antitrust agencies to monitor consolidation patterns in real time and complement traditional transaction-by-transaction merger reviews.
34178.zh_abstract: 我们记录了2010年至2023年科技行业连续收购的新实证模式。利用精细的标准普尔分类体系，我们表明连续收购——同一收购方在同一或相邻市场类别内进行的一系列交易——约占多数控制权并购的四分之一到三分之一。后续目标往往比初始目标更大、更成熟，而公开上市的非私募股权收购方占这些交易的一半以上，这挑战了普遍认为连续收购主要代表小规模私募股权整合的观点。我们进一步考察了一个累积筛选框架，其中监管审查由连续交易的累计价值触发，而非单个交易门槛。这种方法通常维持现有的审查时间或适度提前，但在扩展的收购序列中，它可以将审查提前几个交易或数年。对于GAFAM（谷歌/Alphabet、苹果、Facebook/Meta、亚马逊和微软）及其他顶级科技收购方，累积方法主要将覆盖范围扩大到低于传统门槛的交易以及估值数据不完整的交易，而非加速对已应报告收购的审查。实施此类框架的算法筛选工具可以使反垄断机构实时监控整合模式，并补充传统的逐笔交易并购审查。
34178.meta: Programs：CF, IO, LE, PR；JEL：G34, L10, L40, O38

34199.title: In Money, We Survive: The Effects of Social Security Retirement Income on Longevity
34199.zh_title: 有钱，我们才能生存：社会保障退休收入对长寿的影响
34199.abstract: An old and debated line of research examines the income-mortality relationship and finds mixed evidence. In this paper, we re-evaluate previous studies using a new dataset and implementing a difference-in-difference model based on a Notch in Social Security retirement benefits to overcome selection and endogeneity issues. We employ Social Security Administration death records and find a positive income-longevity relationship. Moreover, we find more pronounced effects among low-educated individuals and people from low socioeconomic status families. Analyses using census data suggest that part of the reductions in retirement income are offset by wage income due to post-retirement labor force participation. Past age 80, the net adverse effects of the policy on both income and longevity become more pronounced.
34199.zh_abstract: 一项历史悠久且备受争议的研究探讨了收入与死亡率之间的关系，并发现了混合的证据。在本文中，我们使用新的数据集，并基于社会保障退休福利中的一个“缺口”实施双重差分模型，以克服选择性和内生性问题，重新评估了以往的研究。我们利用社会保障管理局的死亡记录，发现了收入与长寿之间的正相关关系。此外，我们发现，在低教育水平个体和来自低社会经济地位家庭的个体中，这种效应更为显著。使用人口普查数据进行的分析表明，由于退休后的劳动力参与，退休收入的部分减少被工资收入所抵消。在80岁以后，该政策对收入和长寿的净不利影响变得更加显著。
34199.meta: Programs：AG, DAE, EH, PE；JEL：H40, H50, I1, I18, J1

34198.title: Malfunctioning Democracies: Understanding Accountability Failures in Developing Countries
34198.zh_title: 运转不良的民主：理解发展中国家的问责失败
34198.abstract: This chapter examines why democracies in the developing world frequently underperform in providing effective governance. We argue that these shortcomings stem from weaknesses in accountability mechanisms, which leave governments vulnerable to corruption, clientelism, and elite capture. Our framework distinguishes three accountability channels: vertical (citizens’ control over politicians), horizontal (checks and balances across state institutions), and diagonal (oversight by media and civil society). We synthesize the recent theoretical and empirical literature to assess how each channel operates, the conditions under which it succeeds, and why it often fails. A central finding is that accountability institutions rarely fail on their own; instead, they are actively undermined by political actors seeking to preserve rents and entrench power. This dynamic weakens electoral competition, erodes judicial independence, and curtails media freedom, producing a mutually reinforcing cycle of weak accountability. Additionally, we argue that sustainable reforms cannot be achieved by strengthening any single channel in isolation. Since vertical, horizontal, and diagonal accountability are interdependent, effective reform requires bolstering all three simultaneously. We conclude by discussing the implications of this perspective for future research, including the role of new technologies, political polarization, and candidate selection in reshaping accountability in developing democracies.
34198.zh_abstract: 本章探讨了为什么发展中国家的民主制度在提供有效治理方面常常表现不佳。我们认为，这些缺陷源于问责机制的薄弱，这使得政府容易受到腐败、庇护主义和精英俘获的影响。我们的框架区分了三种问责渠道：纵向问责（公民对政治家的控制）、横向问责（国家机构之间的制衡）和斜向问责（媒体和公民社会的监督）。我们综合了最近的理论和实证文献，以评估每个渠道如何运作、在何种条件下成功，以及为何常常失败。一个核心发现是，问责机构很少自行失败；相反，它们被寻求维持租金和巩固权力的政治行为者主动削弱。这种动态削弱了选举竞争，侵蚀了司法独立，并限制了媒体自由，从而产生了一个相互强化的弱问责循环。此外，我们认为，仅加强任何一个单一渠道都无法实现可持续的改革。由于纵向、横向和斜向问责是相互依存的，有效的改革需要同时加强所有三个渠道。最后，我们讨论了这一观点对未来研究的启示，包括新技术、政治极化和候选人选择在重塑发展中民主国家问责制中的作用。
34198.meta: Programs：DEV, PE, POL；JEL：D72, H11, K42, O43, P50

34197.title: Understanding Patenting Disparities via Causal Human+Machine Learning
34197.zh_title: 通过因果人类+机器学习理解专利差异
34197.authors: Lin William Cong, Stephen Q. Yang
34197.abstract: We develop an empirical approach for analyzing multi-dimensional discrimination using multimodal data, combining human perception measures with language-embedding-based, nonlinear controls for latent quality to relax restrictive assumptions in causal machine learning. Applying it to the U.S. patent examination process, we find that, ceteris paribus, applications from female inventors are 1.8 percentage points less likely to be approved, and those from Black inventors are 3 percentage points less likely—inconsistent with legally prescribed criteria. Jointly studying multiple bias dimensions and their intersections for the first time, we uncover new biases, including an affiliation bias—individual inventors are disadvantaged by 6.6 percentage points relative to employees of large, public firms, a disparity larger than any demographic gap. Moreover, innovation quality, location, and other factors can mitigate or compound discrimination, and the disparities interact: for example, racial gaps vanish among public-firm employees, masking more severe discrimination against individuals. Existing theories such as homophily cannot fully explain the results, but a simple model of correlation neglect does.
34197.zh_abstract: 我们开发了一种实证方法，用于分析使用多模态数据的多维歧视，将人类感知测量与基于语言嵌入的、非线性的潜在质量控制相结合，以放宽因果机器学习中的限制性假设。将其应用于美国专利审查过程，我们发现，在其他条件相同的情况下，女性发明人的申请被批准的可能性低1.8个百分点，黑人发明人的申请被批准的可能性低3个百分点——这与法律规定的标准不一致。首次联合研究多个偏见维度及其交叉点，我们发现了新的偏见，包括一种隶属关系偏见——个人发明人相对于大型上市公司员工处于劣势，差距达6.6个百分点，这一差异大于任何人口统计差距。此外，创新质量、地点和其他因素可以减轻或加剧歧视，并且这些差异相互作用：例如，种族差距在上市公司员工中消失，掩盖了对个人更严重的歧视。现有的理论如同质性无法完全解释这些结果，但一个简单的相关性忽视模型可以。

34196.title: Smart Power Limits: Designing Shortage Mechanisms for Extreme Events
34196.zh_title: 智能功率限制：为极端事件设计短缺机制
34196.abstract: As shortages of resources like water and electricity due to extreme weather events become more frequent, high prices alone may fail to curb demand, making shortages more common. We examine a power limit policy for residential electricity households that rations electricity consumption rather than setting it to zero, as in a traditional rolling blackout. We find that power limits can provide equivalent savings to large blackouts, even when generous. Additionally, due to selection, power limits reduce the number of households affected by a shortage event. We conclude by discussing the welfare consequences of power limits and their heterogeneous impact across households.
34196.zh_abstract: 随着极端天气事件导致的水和电力等资源短缺变得更加频繁，仅靠高价格可能无法抑制需求，从而使短缺更加普遍。我们研究了一种针对居民用电家庭的功率限制政策，该政策对电力消费进行配给，而不是像传统的轮流停电那样将其降至零。我们发现，即使功率限制设置得较为宽松，也能提供与大规模停电相当的节约效果。此外，由于选择性，功率限制减少了受短缺事件影响的家庭数量。最后，我们讨论了功率限制的福利后果及其在不同家庭间的异质性影响。

34192.title: Tariffs as Fiscal Policy
34192.abstract: The year 2025 brought a remarkable shift in the role of tariffs in the US economy, as the Trump administration simultaneously escalated the use of broad tariffs and ensured that Congress enacted large income tax cuts. This fiscal switch has important implications for the US tax system. While maintaining tariff rates at summer 2025 levels would generate large government revenues, such broad tariffs have significant downsides: Efficiency losses would approach one-third of revenues raised, the tax system would be less progressive, and there would be serious tax administration concerns. The fiscal shift also has significant macroeconomic implications, although probably not the intended ones. Broad tariffs generate a large negative supply shock, simultaneously raising prices and reducing macroeconomic activity.
34192.zh_abstract: 2025年，美国经济中关税的角色发生了显著转变，特朗普政府同时升级了广泛关税的使用，并确保国会通过了大规模所得税减税。这一财政转变对美国税收体系具有重要影响。虽然将关税税率维持在2025年夏季水平将产生大量政府收入，但这种广泛关税存在显著弊端：效率损失将接近所筹集收入的三分之一，税收体系的累进性将降低，并且会出现严重的税收管理问题。这一财政转变还具有显著的宏观经济影响，尽管可能并非预期中的效果。广泛关税会产生巨大的负面供给冲击，同时推高价格并减少宏观经济活动。
34192.meta: Programs：IFM, ITI, PE, POL；JEL：F13, F32, F38, F42, F52, H21, H23, H26, H68, L52
